};

================
File: appraisal-mobile/src/screens/CameraScreen.js
================
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import {
  View,
  Text,
  StyleSheet,
  Image,
  Alert,
  ScrollView,
  TouchableOpacity,
  Platform,
} from 'react-native';
import { StatusBar } from 'expo-status-bar';
import { MaterialIcons } from '@expo/vector-icons';
import { useFocusEffect } from '@react-navigation/native';
import { useSafeAreaInsets } from 'react-native-safe-area-context';
import * as ImagePicker from 'expo-image-picker';
import { analyzeImageWithProgress } from '../services/apiV1';
import { saveAppraisal, getAllAppraisals } from '../services/storageService';
import Button from '../components/Button';
import LoadingIndicator from '../components/LoadingIndicator';
import MaterialFAB from '../components/MaterialFAB';
import Card from '../components/Card';
import ResponsiveContainer from '../components/ResponsiveContainer';
import TopAppBar from '../components/TopAppBar';
import { useIsDesktop } from '../utils/responsive';
import { colors, typography, spacing, borderRadius, elevation, motion } from '../constants/theme';

export default function CameraScreen({ navigation }) {
  const [isProcessing, setIsProcessing] = useState(false);
  const [selectedImages, setSelectedImages] = useState([]); // Now an array for multi-select
  const [progress, setProgress] = useState('');
  const [currentProcessingIndex, setCurrentProcessingIndex] = useState(0);
  const [recentItems, setRecentItems] = useState([]); // Dashboard: Recent Activity
  const [error, setError] = useState(null);
  const [dragActive, setDragActive] = useState(false);
  const isDesktop = useIsDesktop();
  const insets = useSafeAreaInsets();
  
  // Calculate proper bottom padding: tab bar (80px) + safe area + FAB (56px) + breathing room
  const scrollBottomPadding = 80 + insets.bottom + 100;

  // Load recent activity whenever screen gains focus (Dashboard utility)
  useFocusEffect(
    React.useCallback(() => {
      loadRecentActivity();
    }, [])
  );

  const loadRecentActivity = async () => {
    try {
      const allAppraisals = await getAllAppraisals();
      setRecentItems(allAppraisals.slice(0, 3)); // Top 3 most recent
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to load recent activity:', error);
    }
  };

  const requestPermissions = async () => {
    const { status: cameraStatus } = await ImagePicker.requestCameraPermissionsAsync();
    const { status: libraryStatus } = await ImagePicker.requestMediaLibraryPermissionsAsync();
    
    if (cameraStatus !== 'granted' || libraryStatus !== 'granted') {
      Alert.alert(
        'Permission Required',
        'Please grant camera and photo library permissions to use this app.'
      );
      return false;
    }
    return true;
  };

  const takePhoto = async () => {
    const hasPermission = await requestPermissions();
    if (!hasPermission) return;

    const result = await ImagePicker.launchCameraAsync({
      mediaTypes: ['images'],
      allowsEditing: true,
      quality: 0.8,
      base64: true,
    });

    if (!result.canceled) {
      const asset = result.assets[0];
      if (!asset.base64) {
        Alert.alert(
          'Error',
          'Failed to get image data. Please try again or use a different image.'
        );
        console.error('No base64 data from camera:', asset);
        return;
      }
      const newImage = {
        id: Date.now().toString(),
        uri: asset.uri,
        base64: asset.base64,
      };
      console.log('Camera image added, base64 length:', asset.base64.length);
      setSelectedImages(prev => [...prev, newImage]);
    }
  };

  const pickImage = async () => {
    const hasPermission = await requestPermissions();
    if (!hasPermission) return;

    const result = await ImagePicker.launchImageLibraryAsync({
      mediaTypes: ['images'],
      allowsEditing: false, // Allow multiple selection
      allowsMultipleSelection: true,
      quality: 0.8,
      base64: true,
    });

    if (!result.canceled) {
      // Process images and handle missing base64 (common on web platform)
      const imagePromises = result.assets.map(async (asset, index) => {
        let base64Data = asset.base64;
        
        // If base64 is not provided (web platform issue), try to read file manually
        if (!base64Data && asset.uri) {
          try {
            console.log('Attempting to read file manually for:', asset.uri);
            const response = await fetch(asset.uri);
            const blob = await response.blob();
            base64Data = await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
              const reader = new FileReader();
              reader.onloadend = () => {
                // Remove data URI prefix to get just base64
                const result = reader.result;
                const base64 = result.split(',')[1];
                resolve(base64);
              };
              reader.onerror = reject;
              reader.readAsDataURL(blob);
            });
            console.log('Successfully read file, base64 length:', base64Data.length);
          } catch (error) {
            console.error('Failed to read file manually:', error);
            return null;
          }
        }
        
        if (!base64Data) {
          console.warn('Skipping image without base64 data:', asset.uri);
          return null;
        }
        
        return {
          id: `${Date.now()}_${index}`,
          uri: asset.uri,
          base64: base64Data,
        };
      });
      
      const newImages = (await Promise.all(imagePromises)).filter(img => img !== null);
      
      if (newImages.length === 0) {
        Alert.alert(
          'Error',
          'Could not load image data. Please try again with different images.'
        );
        return;
      }
      
      console.log(`Gallery images added: ${newImages.length}, base64 lengths:`, 
        newImages.map(img => img.base64.length));
      setSelectedImages(prev => [...prev, ...newImages]);
    }
  };

  const removeImage = (imageId) => {
    setSelectedImages(prev => prev.filter(img => img.id !== imageId));
  };

  const analyzeBatch = async () => {
    if (selectedImages.length === 0) return;
    
    setIsProcessing(true);
    setError(null);
    
    try {
      for (let i = 0; i < selectedImages.length; i++) {
        const image = selectedImages[i];
        
        setProgress(`Analyzing item ${i + 1} of ${selectedImages.length}...`);
        
        const result = await analyzeImageWithProgress(image.base64, (progressData) => {
          setProgress(`Item ${i + 1}/${selectedImages.length}: ${progressData.status}`);
        });
        
        await saveAppraisal(result, image.uri);
      }
      
      setSelectedImages([]);
      setIsProcessing(false);
      setProgress('');
      
      const msg = `✅ Analyzed ${selectedImages.length} item${selectedImages.length > 1 ? 's' : ''}!`;
      if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
        if (window.confirm(msg + ' View in History?')) {
          navigation.navigate('History');
        }
      } else {
        Alert.alert('Success', msg, [
          { text: 'View History', onPress: () => navigation.navigate('History') },
          { text: 'OK', style: 'cancel' }
        ]);
      }
      
    } catch (error) {
      setIsProcessing(false);
      setProgress('');
      setError(error.message);
      
      if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
        window.alert('Error: ' + error.message);
      } else {
        Alert.alert('Error', error.message);
      }
    }
  };

  // Drag and drop handlers for web
  const handleDragOver = (e) => {
    if (Platform.OS !== 'web') return;
    e.preventDefault();
    setDragActive(true);
  };

  const handleDragLeave = (e) => {
    if (Platform.OS !== 'web') return;
    e.preventDefault();
    setDragActive(false);
  };

  const handleDrop = async (e) => {
    if (Platform.OS !== 'web') return;
    e.preventDefault();
    setDragActive(false);

    const files = Array.from(e.dataTransfer.files);
    const imageFiles = files.filter(file => file.type.startsWith('image/'));

    if (imageFiles.length === 0) {
      Alert.alert('Error', 'Please drop image files only');
      return;
    }

    const imagePromises = imageFiles.map(async (file, index) => {
      return new Promise((resolve) => {
        const reader = new FileReader();
        reader.onloadend = () => {
          const base64 = reader.result.split(',')[1];
          resolve({
            id: `${Date.now()}_${index}`,
            uri: reader.result,
            base64: base64,
          });
        };
        reader.readAsDataURL(file);
      });
    });

    const newImages = await Promise.all(imagePromises);
    setSelectedImages(prev => [...prev, ...newImages]);
  };

  // Desktop split-view layout
  if (isDesktop) {
    return (
      <View style={styles.container}>
        <StatusBar barStyle="dark-content" />
        
        <View style={styles.desktopSplit}>
          {/* Left Column: Hero Content */}
          <View style={styles.heroColumn}>
            <View style={styles.heroColumnContent}>
              <Text style={styles.desktopTitle}>Turn Your Items Into Cash</Text>
              <Text style={styles.desktopSubtitle}>
                Professional AI-powered appraisals using real eBay market data.
                Get instant pricing for your items and list them in seconds.
              </Text>
              
              <View style={styles.featureGrid}>
                <View style={styles.featureGridItem}>
                  <MaterialIcons name="speed" size={32} color={colors.primary.main} />
                  <Text style={styles.featureGridTitle}>Instant Analysis</Text>
                  <Text style={styles.featureGridText}>AI processes your items in seconds</Text>
                </View>
                <View style={styles.featureGridItem}>
                  <MaterialIcons name="trending-up" size={32} color={colors.primary.main} />
                  <Text style={styles.featureGridTitle}>Market Data</Text>
                  <Text style={styles.featureGridText}>Real eBay sales intelligence</Text>
                </View>
                <View style={styles.featureGridItem}>
                  <MaterialIcons name="layers" size={32} color={colors.primary.main} />
                  <Text style={styles.featureGridTitle}>Batch Processing</Text>
                  <Text style={styles.featureGridText}>Analyze multiple items at once</Text>
                </View>
              </View>
            </View>
          </View>

          {/* Right Column: Upload Zone */}
          <ScrollView style={styles.uploadColumn} contentContainerStyle={styles.uploadColumnContent}>
            {isProcessing ? (
              <LoadingIndicator 
                message="Appraising Your Items..."
                submessage={progress || 'This may take a moment.'}
              />
            ) : (
              <>
                {/* Error Display */}
                {error && (
                  <View style={styles.errorContainer}>
                    <Text style={styles.errorIcon}>⚠️</Text>
                    <Text style={styles.errorText}>{error}</Text>
                    <TouchableOpacity 
                      style={styles.dismissButton}
                      onPress={() => setError(null)}
                    >
                      <Text style={styles.dismissText}>Dismiss</Text>
                    </TouchableOpacity>
                  </View>
                )}

                {/* Drag and Drop Zone */}
                <View
                  style={[styles.dropZone, dragActive && styles.dropZoneActive]}
                  onDragOver={handleDragOver}
                  onDragLeave={handleDragLeave}
                  onDrop={handleDrop}
                >
                  <MaterialIcons 
                    name="cloud-upload" 
                    size={64} 
                    color={dragActive ? colors.primary.main : colors.surface.onSurfaceVariant} 
                  />
                  <Text style={styles.dropZoneTitle}>
                    {dragActive ? 'Drop your images here' : 'Drag photos here'}
                  </Text>
                  <Text style={styles.dropZoneSubtitle}>or</Text>
                  <Button 
                    variant="filled"
                    onPress={pickImage}
                    icon={<MaterialIcons name="add-photo-alternate" size={20} color={colors.primary.onPrimary} />}
                  >
                    Browse Files
                  </Button>
                </View>

                {/* Selected Images Grid */}
                {selectedImages.length > 0 && (
                  <Card style={styles.stagingCard} elevation="level1">
                    <Text style={styles.stagingTitle}>
                      Selected Items ({selectedImages.length})
                    </Text>
                    <View style={styles.thumbnailGrid}>
                      {selectedImages.map((image) => (
                        <Card key={image.id} style={styles.thumbnailContainer} elevation="level2">
                          <Image source={{ uri: image.uri }} style={styles.thumbnail} />
                          <TouchableOpacity
                            style={styles.removeButton}
                            onPress={() => removeImage(image.id)}
                          >
                            <Text style={styles.removeIcon}>✕</Text>
                          </TouchableOpacity>
                        </Card>
                      ))}
                    </View>
                    <Button 
                      variant="filled"
                      onPress={analyzeBatch}
                      style={styles.analyzeButton}
                    >
                      Analyze {selectedImages.length} {selectedImages.length === 1 ? 'Item' : 'Items'}
                    </Button>
                  </Card>
                )}
              </>
            )}
          </ScrollView>
        </View>
      </View>
    );
  }

  // Mobile layout (original)
  return (
    <ResponsiveContainer maxWidth={600} style={styles.container}>
      <StatusBar barStyle="dark-content" />
      
      {/* Material Design Top App Bar */}
      <TopAppBar 
        variant="brand"
        title="ValueSnap" 
      />

      {/* Main Content */}
      <ScrollView 
        style={styles.scrollView}
        contentContainerStyle={[
          styles.content,
          { paddingBottom: scrollBottomPadding } // CRITICAL: Prevents FAB overlap on mobile
        ]}
        // Web: avoid scroll event listeners that block wheel events
        {...(Platform.OS !== 'web' && {
          scrollEventThrottle: 16,
          nestedScrollEnabled: true,
        })}
      >
        {isProcessing ? (
          <LoadingIndicator 
            message="Appraising Your Items..."
            submessage={progress || 'This may take a moment.'}
          />
        ) : (
          <>
            {/* Error Display */}
            {error && (
              <View style={styles.errorContainer}>
                <Text style={styles.errorIcon}>⚠️</Text>
                <Text style={styles.errorText}>{error}</Text>
                <TouchableOpacity 
                  style={styles.dismissButton}
                  onPress={() => setError(null)}
                >
                  <Text style={styles.dismissText}>Dismiss</Text>
                </TouchableOpacity>
              </View>
            )}
            
            {/* Staging Area */}
            {selectedImages.length > 0 ? (
              <Card style={styles.stagingCard} elevation="level1">
                <Text style={styles.stagingTitle}>
                  Items to Appraise ({selectedImages.length})
                </Text>
                <View style={styles.thumbnailGrid}>
                  {selectedImages.map((image) => (
                    <Card key={image.id} style={styles.thumbnailContainer} elevation="level2">
                      <Image source={{ uri: image.uri }} style={styles.thumbnail} />
                      <TouchableOpacity
                        style={styles.removeButton}
                        onPress={() => removeImage(image.id)}
                      >
                        <Text style={styles.removeIcon}>✕</Text>
                      </TouchableOpacity>
                    </Card>
                  ))}
                </View>
              </Card>
            ) : (
              <>
                {/* Hero Section - Compact card instead of full-screen landing */}
                <View style={styles.heroSurface}>
                  <View style={styles.heroContent}>
                    <View style={styles.heroIconContainer}>
                      <MaterialIcons name="photo-camera" size={64} color={colors.primary.main} />
                    </View>
                    <Text style={styles.heroTitle}>Get Instant Pricing</Text>
                    <Text style={styles.heroSubtitle}>
                      Snap photos of your items and receive accurate market valuations powered by AI and real eBay sales data
                    </Text>
                    <View style={styles.featureList}>
                      <View style={styles.featureItem}>
                        <MaterialIcons name="check-circle" size={20} color={colors.secondary.main} style={styles.featureIcon} />
                        <Text style={styles.featureText}>Real-time market analysis</Text>
                      </View>
                      <View style={styles.featureItem}>
                        <MaterialIcons name="check-circle" size={20} color={colors.secondary.main} style={styles.featureIcon} />
                        <Text style={styles.featureText}>Quick & patient sell pricing</Text>
                      </View>
                      <View style={styles.featureItem}>
                        <MaterialIcons name="check-circle" size={20} color={colors.secondary.main} style={styles.featureIcon} />
                        <Text style={styles.featureText}>Batch multiple items at once</Text>
                      </View>
                    </View>
                  </View>
                  
                  {/* Action Buttons */}
                  <View style={styles.actionButtons}>
                    <Button 
                      variant="filled"
                      onPress={takePhoto}
                      icon={<MaterialIcons name="camera-alt" size={20} color={colors.primary.onPrimary} />}
                      style={styles.primaryActionButton}
                    >
                      Take Photo
                    </Button>
                    <Button 
                      variant="outlined"
                      onPress={pickImage}
                      icon={<MaterialIcons name="photo-library" size={20} color={colors.primary.main} />}
                      style={styles.secondaryActionButton}
                    >
                      Choose from Gallery
                    </Button>
                  </View>
                </View>

                {/* Recent Activity Dashboard - Makes it feel like an app, not a landing page */}
                <View style={styles.recentActivitySection}>
                  <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>Recent Activity</Text>
                  
                  {recentItems.length === 0 ? (
                    <TouchableOpacity 
                      onPress={() => navigation.navigate('History')}
                      style={styles.recentActivityCard}
                    >
                      <MaterialIcons name="history" size={32} color={colors.surface.onSurfaceVariant} />
                      <Text style={styles.recentActivityText}>No recent scans yet</Text>
                      <MaterialIcons name="chevron-right" size={24} color={colors.surface.onSurfaceVariant} />
                    </TouchableOpacity>
                  ) : (
                    <>
                      {recentItems.map((item) => {
                        const structuredData = item.result?.structured_data || {};
                        const itemName = structuredData.item_type || 'Unknown Item';
                        const price = item.result?.quicksell_price;
                        
                        return (
                          <TouchableOpacity 
                            key={item.id}
                            onPress={() => navigation.navigate('History')}
                            style={styles.recentItemCard}
                          >
                            <Image 
                              source={{ uri: item.imageUri }} 
                              style={styles.recentItemImage}
                              resizeMode="cover"
                            />
                            <View style={styles.recentItemContent}>
                              <Text style={styles.recentItemTitle} numberOfLines={1}>
                                {itemName}
                              </Text>
                              <Text style={styles.recentItemPrice}>
                                {typeof price === 'number' ? `$${price.toFixed(2)}` : 'N/A'}
                              </Text>
                            </View>
                            <MaterialIcons name="chevron-right" size={20} color={colors.surface.onSurfaceVariant} />
                          </TouchableOpacity>
                        );
                      })}
                      <TouchableOpacity 
                        onPress={() => navigation.navigate('History')}
                        style={styles.viewAllButton}
                      >
                        <Text style={styles.viewAllText}>View All History</Text>
                        <MaterialIcons name="arrow-forward" size={16} color={colors.primary.main} />
                      </TouchableOpacity>
                    </>
                  )}
                </View>
              </>
            )}
            
            {/* Gallery action removed - now accessible via FAB or secondary means */}

            {/* Analyze button for staged items */}
            {selectedImages.length > 0 && (
              <Button 
                variant="filled"
                onPress={analyzeBatch}
                style={styles.analyzeButton}
              >
                Analyze {selectedImages.length} {selectedImages.length === 1 ? 'Item' : 'Items'}
              </Button>
            )}
          </>
        )}
      </ScrollView>

      {/* FAB buttons removed - now inline under Get Instant Pricing card */}

      {/* Trustworthy Footer */}
      {!isProcessing && (
        <View style={styles.footer}>
          <Text style={styles.footerText}>
            🔒 Securely Powered by OpenAI & eBay Market Data
          </Text>
        </View>
      )}
    </ResponsiveContainer>
  );
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container: {
    flex: 1,

File: appraisal-mobile/src/screens/HistoryScreen.js
================
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import {
  View,
  Text,
  StyleSheet,
  FlatList,
  ScrollView,
  TouchableOpacity,
  Image,
  RefreshControl,
  Platform,
} from 'react-native';
import { StatusBar } from 'expo-status-bar';
import { useSafeAreaInsets } from 'react-native-safe-area-context';
import { MaterialIcons } from '@expo/vector-icons';
import RippleCard from '../components/RippleCard';
import TopAppBar from '../components/TopAppBar';
import { colors, typography, spacing, borderRadius } from '../constants/theme';
import { getAllAppraisals } from '../services/storageService';

/**
 * Helper Functions
 */
const formatPrice = (price) => {
  if (typeof price === 'number') {
    return `$${price.toFixed(2)}`;
  }
  return price || 'N/A';
};

const formatDate = (timestamp) => {
  const date = new Date(timestamp);
  return date.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { 
    month: 'short', 
    day: 'numeric', 
    year: 'numeric' 
  });
};

/**
 * AppraisalCard Component - Individual card with image error handling
 */
const AppraisalCard = ({ item, onPress }) => {
  const [imageError, setImageError] = useState(false);
  
  const structuredData = item.result?.structured_data || {};
  const itemName = structuredData.brand 
    ? `${structuredData.brand} ${structuredData.item_type || ''}`
    : structuredData.item_type || 'Untitled Item';
  
  const price = formatPrice(item.result?.quicksell_price || item.result?.patient_sell_price);

  return (
    <View style={styles.cardWrapper}>
      <RippleCard
        onPress={() => onPress(item)}
        elevation="level1"
        style={styles.appraisalCard}
        interactive={true}
        accessible={true}
        accessibilityRole="button"
        accessibilityLabel={`View ${itemName}, appraised at ${price}, from ${formatDate(item.timestamp)}`}
        accessibilityHint="Tap to view full appraisal details"
      >
        {/* Left: Full-height image with error fallback */}
        {!imageError && item.imageUri ? (
          <Image 
            source={{ uri: item.imageUri }} 
            style={styles.cardImage}
            onError={() => setImageError(true)}
          />
        ) : (
          <View 
            style={[styles.cardImage, styles.imagePlaceholder]}
            importantForAccessibility="no"
            accessibilityElementsHidden={true}
          >
            <MaterialIcons 
              name="image" 
              size={32} 
              color={colors.surface.onSurfaceVariant}
              importantForAccessibility="no" 
            />
          </View>
        )}
        
        {/* Middle: Title and date */}
        <View style={styles.cardContent}>
          <Text style={styles.cardTitle} numberOfLines={2}>
            {itemName}
          </Text>
          <Text style={styles.cardDate}>
            {formatDate(item.timestamp)}
          </Text>
        </View>
        
        {/* Right: Price and chevron */}
        <View style={styles.cardPriceSection}>
          <Text style={styles.cardPrice}>{price}</Text>
          <Text 
            style={styles.cardChevron}
            importantForAccessibility="no"
            accessibilityElementsHidden={true}
          >
            ›
          </Text>
        </View>
      </RippleCard>
    </View>
  );
};

/**
 * HistoryScreen - Display past appraisals
 * 
 * ARCHITECTURE NOTE:
 * - Web: Uses ScrollView + map() for native browser scrolling (no wheel event issues)
 * - Native: Uses FlatList for virtualized performance
 */
export default function HistoryScreen({ navigation }) {
  const [appraisals, setAppraisals] = useState([]);
  const [refreshing, setRefreshing] = useState(false);
  const insets = useSafeAreaInsets();
  const isWeb = Platform.OS === 'web';
  
  // Calculate proper bottom padding: tab bar (80px) + safe area + breathing room
  const listBottomPadding = isWeb ? 40 : (80 + insets.bottom + 20);

  useEffect(() => {
    loadAppraisals();
    
    // Reload when screen comes into focus
    const unsubscribe = navigation.addListener('focus', () => {
      loadAppraisals();
    });
    
    return unsubscribe;
  }, [navigation]);

  const loadAppraisals = async () => {
    try {
      const data = await getAllAppraisals();
      setAppraisals(data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading appraisals:', error);
    }
  };

  const onRefresh = async () => {
    setRefreshing(true);
    await loadAppraisals();
    setRefreshing(false);
  };

  const handleAppraisalPress = (item) => {
    navigation.navigate('AppraiseStack', {
      screen: 'Results',
      params: {
        result: item.result,
        imageUri: item.imageUri,
        fromHistory: true,
      },
    });
  };

  const renderEmptyState = () => (
    <View style={styles.emptyState}>
      <MaterialIcons 
        name="inventory-2" 
        size={64} 
        color={colors.surface.onSurfaceVariant}
        style={{ opacity: 0.4 }}
        importantForAccessibility="no"
        accessibilityElementsHidden={true}
      />
      <Text style={styles.emptyTitle}>No Appraisals Yet</Text>
      <Text style={styles.emptySubtitle}>
        Your past appraisals will appear here.{'\n'}
        Tap the Appraise tab to get started!
      </Text>
    </View>
  );

  // WEB: Use native ScrollView for proper browser scrolling
  if (isWeb) {
    return (
      <View style={styles.webContainer}>
        <StatusBar barStyle="dark-content" />
        <TopAppBar 
          title="History" 
          subtitle="Your saved appraisals"
        />
        
        <ScrollView 
          style={styles.webScrollView}
          contentContainerStyle={[
            styles.listContent,
            appraisals.length === 0 && styles.listContentEmpty,
            { paddingBottom: listBottomPadding }
          ]}
        >
          {appraisals.length === 0 ? (
            renderEmptyState()
          ) : (
            appraisals.map((item, index) => (
              <View key={item.id}>
                <AppraisalCard item={item} onPress={handleAppraisalPress} />
                {index < appraisals.length - 1 && <View style={styles.cardSeparator} />}
              </View>
            ))
          )}
        </ScrollView>
      </View>
    );
  }

  // NATIVE: Use FlatList for virtualized performance
  return (
    <View style={styles.nativeContainer}>
      <StatusBar barStyle="dark-content" />
      <TopAppBar 
        title="History" 
        subtitle="Your saved appraisals"
      />

      <FlatList
        data={appraisals}
        renderItem={({ item }) => <AppraisalCard item={item} onPress={handleAppraisalPress} />}
        keyExtractor={(item) => item.id}
        style={styles.nativeFlatList}
        contentContainerStyle={[
          styles.listContent,
          appraisals.length === 0 && styles.listContentEmpty,
          { paddingBottom: listBottomPadding }
        ]}
        ItemSeparatorComponent={() => <View style={styles.cardSeparator} />}
        ListEmptyComponent={renderEmptyState}
        refreshControl={
          <RefreshControl
            refreshing={refreshing}
            onRefresh={onRefresh}
            tintColor={colors.primary.main}
            colors={[colors.primary.main]}
          />
        }
        nestedScrollEnabled={true}
        removeClippedSubviews={true}
        scrollEventThrottle={16}
      />
    </View>
  );
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  // === WEB STYLES ===
  webContainer: {
    flex: 1,
    backgroundColor: colors.background.main,
    display: 'flex',
    flexDirection: 'column',
    // CRITICAL: Use explicit height for proper scroll calculation
    height: '100%',
    minHeight: 0, // Required for flex children to scroll properly
    overflow: 'hidden', // Let child ScrollView handle scrolling
  },
  webScrollView: {
    flex: 1,
    minHeight: 0, // Required for flex children to calculate scroll height
    // Explicit overflow for web scroll behavior
    ...(Platform.OS === 'web' && {
      overflowY: 'auto',
      overflowX: 'hidden',
    }),
  },
  
  // === NATIVE STYLES ===
  nativeContainer: {
    flex: 1,
    backgroundColor: colors.background.main,
  },
  nativeFlatList: {
    flex: 1,
  },
  
  // === SHARED STYLES ===
  listContent: {
    paddingHorizontal: spacing.md,
    paddingVertical: spacing.sm,
  },
  listContentEmpty: {
    flexGrow: 1,
    justifyContent: 'center',
    alignItems: 'center',
  },
  
  cardWrapper: {
    marginHorizontal: spacing.xs,
  },
  
  appraisalCard: {
    flexDirection: 'row',
    backgroundColor: colors.surface.main,
    borderRadius: borderRadius.md,
    alignItems: 'center',
    minHeight: 72,
    paddingVertical: spacing.sm,
  },
  
  cardSeparator: {
    height: spacing.sm,
  },
  
  cardImage: {
    width: 56,
    height: 56,
    borderRadius: 8,
    backgroundColor: colors.surface.surfaceContainerHigh,
    marginVertical: spacing.sm,
    marginLeft: spacing.md,
  },
  imagePlaceholder: {
    justifyContent: 'center',
    alignItems: 'center',
    backgroundColor: colors.surface.surfaceContainer,
  },
  
  cardContent: {
    flex: 1,
    paddingHorizontal: spacing.md,
    justifyContent: 'center',
  },
  cardTitle: {
    fontSize: 16,
    fontWeight: typography.fontWeight.medium,
    letterSpacing: 0.15,
    color: colors.surface.onSurface,
    marginBottom: spacing.xs / 2,
    lineHeight: 24,
  },
  cardDate: {
    fontSize: 14,
    fontWeight: typography.fontWeight.regular,
    letterSpacing: 0.25,
    color: colors.surface.onSurfaceVariant,
  },
  
  cardPriceSection: {
    flexDirection: 'column',
    alignItems: 'flex-end',
    paddingRight: spacing.md,
    paddingLeft: spacing.sm,
  },
  cardPrice: {
    fontSize: 16,
    fontWeight: typography.fontWeight.bold,
    letterSpacing: 0.15,
    color: colors.primary.main,
  },
  cardChevron: {
    fontSize: 20,
    color: colors.surface.onSurfaceVariant,
    marginTop: spacing.xs / 2,
  },
  
  emptyState: {
    alignItems: 'center',
    paddingHorizontal: spacing['2xl'],
  },
  emptyTitle: {
    marginTop: spacing.lg,
    fontSize: typography.fontSize.xl,
    fontWeight: typography.fontWeight.semibold,
    color: colors.surface.onSurface,
    marginBottom: spacing.sm,
  },
  emptySubtitle: {
    fontSize: typography.fontSize.base,
    color: colors.surface.onSurfaceVariant,
    textAlign: 'center',
    lineHeight: typography.lineHeight.relaxed * typography.fontSize.base,
  },
});

================
File: appraisal-mobile/src/screens/ListOnEbayScreen.js
================
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import {
  View,
  Text,
  StyleSheet,
  ScrollView,
  TextInput,
  Image,
  TouchableOpacity,
  Alert,
  ActivityIndicator,
  Platform,
} from 'react-native';
import { StatusBar } from 'expo-status-bar';
import { useSafeAreaInsets } from 'react-native-safe-area-context';
import * as WebBrowser from 'expo-web-browser';
import Button from '../components/Button';
import Card from '../components/Card';
import MaterialTextField from '../components/MaterialTextField';
import { colors, typography, spacing, borderRadius, elevation } from '../constants/theme';
import { checkEbayAuthStatus, initiateEbayAuth, handleEbayAuthCallback, createEbayListing } from '../services/ebayAuth';

/**
 * ListOnEbayScreen - Phase 1.1 Implementation
 * 
 * Provides an elegant interface for users to list their appraised items on eBay.
 * Features:
 * - Pre-filled data from AI analysis
 * - Three pricing options: Quick Sell, Patient Sell, Custom
 * - Editable title and description
 * - Collapsible details section
 * - Professional, user-centric design
 */
export default function ListOnEbayScreen({ route, navigation }) {
  const { result, imageUri } = route.params;
  const insets = useSafeAreaInsets();

  // Extract data from the analysis result
  const structuredData = result.structured_data || {};
  const quickSellPrice = result.quicksell_price || 0;
  const patientSellPrice = result.patient_sell_price || 0;
  const description = result.description || '';
  const sellTimeEstimate = result.sell_time_estimate || '~14-21 days';
  
  // Calculate proper bottom padding: tab bar (80px) + safe area + fixed button (80px) + breathing room
  const scrollBottomPadding = 80 + insets.bottom + 120;

  // State management
  const [priceOption, setPriceOption] = useState('quick'); // 'quick', 'patient', 'custom'
  const [selectedPrice, setSelectedPrice] = useState(quickSellPrice);
  const [customPrice, setCustomPrice] = useState('');
  const [title, setTitle] = useState(
    structuredData.brand && structuredData.item_type
      ? `${structuredData.brand} ${structuredData.item_type}`
      : structuredData.item_type || 'Item'
  );
  const [itemDescription, setItemDescription] = useState(description);
  const [showDetails, setShowDetails] = useState(false);
  
  // eBay OAuth state
  const [isEbayLinked, setIsEbayLinked] = useState(false);
  const [checkingAuth, setCheckingAuth] = useState(true);
  const [isListing, setIsListing] = useState(false);

  // Check eBay authorization status on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    checkAuthStatus();
  }, []);

  const checkAuthStatus = async () => {
    try {
      setCheckingAuth(true);
      const status = await checkEbayAuthStatus();
      setIsEbayLinked(status.linked && !status.token_expired);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error checking auth status:', error);
      setIsEbayLinked(false);
    } finally {
      setCheckingAuth(false);
    }
  };

  // Handle price option selection
  const handlePriceOptionSelect = (option, price) => {
    setPriceOption(option);
    if (option !== 'custom') {
      setSelectedPrice(price);
    }
  };

  // Handle custom price input
  const handleCustomPriceChange = (text) => {
    // Only allow numbers and decimal point
    const cleaned = text.replace(/[^0-9.]/g, '');
    setCustomPrice(cleaned);
    setSelectedPrice(parseFloat(cleaned) || 0);
  };

  // Format price for display
  const formatPrice = (price) => {
    if (typeof price === 'number') {
      return `$${price.toFixed(2)}`;
    }
    return price;
  };

  // Handle eBay OAuth authorization
  const handleEbayAuthorization = async () => {
    try {
      // Initiate OAuth flow
      const authData = await initiateEbayAuth();
      
      // Open eBay authorization page in browser
      const result = await WebBrowser.openAuthSessionAsync(
        authData.authorization_url,
        'https://yourapp.com/ebay/callback'  // Should match EBAY_OAUTH_REDIRECT_URI
      );

      if (result.type === 'success') {
        // Extract code and state from URL
        const url = result.url;
        const codeMatch = url.match(/code=([^&]+)/);
        const stateMatch = url.match(/state=([^&]+)/);
        
        if (codeMatch && stateMatch) {
          const code = codeMatch[1];
          const state = stateMatch[1];
          
          // Handle callback (this will store tokens in backend)
          await handleEbayAuthCallback(code, state);
          
          // Update auth status
          await checkAuthStatus();
          
          Alert.alert(
            '✅ Authorization Successful',
            'Your eBay account has been linked. You can now list items!'
          );
        }
      } else {
        Alert.alert(
          'Authorization Cancelled',
          'You need to authorize your eBay account to list items.'
        );
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('OAuth error:', error);
      Alert.alert(
        'Authorization Failed',
        error.message || 'Failed to link eBay account. Please try again.'
      );
    }
  };

  // Handle listing submission
  const handleListOnEbay = async () => {
    // Validation
    if (!title.trim()) {
      Alert.alert('Missing Information', 'Please enter a title for your item.');
      return;
    }

    if (priceOption === 'custom' && (!customPrice || parseFloat(customPrice) <= 0)) {
      Alert.alert('Invalid Price', 'Please enter a valid custom price.');
      return;
    }

    // Check if eBay account is linked
    if (!isEbayLinked) {
      Alert.alert(
        'eBay Authorization Required',
        'To list this item on eBay, you need to authorize your eBay account first.',
        [
          {
            text: 'Cancel',
            style: 'cancel',
          },
          {
            text: 'Authorize Now',
            onPress: handleEbayAuthorization,
          },
        ]
      );
      return;
    }

    const finalPrice = priceOption === 'custom' ? parseFloat(customPrice) : selectedPrice;
    
    // Confirm listing
    Alert.alert(
      'Confirm Listing',
      `List this item on eBay?\n\nTitle: ${title}\nPrice: ${formatPrice(finalPrice)}`,
      [
        {
          text: 'Cancel',
          style: 'cancel',
        },
        {
          text: 'List Now',
          onPress: () => submitListing(finalPrice),
        },
      ]
    );
  };

  // Submit listing to eBay
  const submitListing = async (finalPrice) => {
    try {
      setIsListing(true);

      const listingData = {
        title: title.trim(),
        description: itemDescription || description,
        price: finalPrice,
        category_id: structuredData.category_id || '11700',
        condition_id: structuredData.condition_id || '3000',
        image_urls: imageUri ? [imageUri] : [],
        quantity: 1,
      };

      const result = await createEbayListing(listingData);

      if (result.success) {
        // Navigate to success screen
        navigation.navigate('ListSuccess', {
          itemId: result.item_id,
          listingUrl: result.listing_url,
          title: title,
          price: finalPrice,
        });
      } else {
        throw new Error('Listing creation failed');
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Listing error:', error);
      Alert.alert(
        'Listing Failed',
        error.message || 'Failed to create eBay listing. Please try again.'
      );
    } finally {
      setIsListing(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <View style={styles.container}>
      <StatusBar barStyle="dark-content" />
      
      {/* Header */}
      <View style={styles.header}>
        <TouchableOpacity 
          onPress={() => navigation.goBack()} 
          style={styles.backButton}
        >
          <Text style={styles.backIcon}>←</Text>
        </TouchableOpacity>
        <Text style={styles.headerTitle}>List on eBay</Text>
        <View style={styles.headerSpacer} />
      </View>

      <ScrollView 
        style={styles.scrollView}
        contentContainerStyle={[styles.scrollContent, { paddingBottom: scrollBottomPadding }]}
        showsVerticalScrollIndicator={false}
        {...(Platform.OS !== 'web' && {
          scrollEventThrottle: 16,
          nestedScrollEnabled: true,
        })}
      >
        {/* Item Image Preview */}
        {imageUri && (
          <Card noPadding style={styles.imageCard}>
            <Image source={{ uri: imageUri }} style={styles.image} />
          </Card>
        )}

        {/* Item Title - Editable */}
        <Card>
          <Text style={styles.cardTitle}>Item Title</Text>
          <TextInput
            style={styles.titleInput}
            value={title}
            onChangeText={setTitle}
            placeholder="Enter a descriptive title"
            placeholderTextColor={colors.surface.onSurfaceVariant}
            maxLength={80}
          />
          <Text style={styles.charCount}>{title.length}/80 characters</Text>
        </Card>

        {/* Pricing Options */}
        <Card>
          <Text style={styles.cardTitle}>💰 Choose Your Price</Text>
          <Text style={styles.cardSubtitle}>
            Select a pricing strategy based on your timeline
          </Text>

          {/* Quick Sell Option */}
          <TouchableOpacity
            style={[
              styles.priceOption,
              priceOption === 'quick' && styles.priceOptionSelected,
            ]}
            onPress={() => handlePriceOptionSelect('quick', quickSellPrice)}
          >
            <View style={styles.priceOptionContent}>
              <Text style={styles.priceOptionEmoji}>💵</Text>
              <View style={styles.priceOptionText}>
                <Text style={styles.priceOptionTitle}>Sell Fast</Text>
                <Text style={styles.priceOptionSubtext}>~7 days to sell</Text>
              </View>
              <Text style={styles.priceOptionPrice}>{formatPrice(quickSellPrice)}</Text>
            </View>
          </TouchableOpacity>

          {/* Patient Sell Option */}
          <TouchableOpacity
            style={[
              styles.priceOption,
              priceOption === 'patient' && styles.priceOptionSelected,
            ]}
            onPress={() => handlePriceOptionSelect('patient', patientSellPrice)}
          >
            <View style={styles.priceOptionContent}>
              <Text style={styles.priceOptionEmoji}>💰</Text>
              <View style={styles.priceOptionText}>
                <Text style={styles.priceOptionTitle}>Sell High</Text>
                <Text style={styles.priceOptionSubtext}>{sellTimeEstimate}</Text>
              </View>
              <Text style={styles.priceOptionPrice}>{formatPrice(patientSellPrice)}</Text>
            </View>
          </TouchableOpacity>

          {/* Custom Price Option */}
          <TouchableOpacity
            style={[
              styles.priceOption,
              priceOption === 'custom' && styles.priceOptionSelected,
            ]}
            onPress={() => handlePriceOptionSelect('custom', 0)}
          >
            <View style={styles.priceOptionContent}>
              <Text style={styles.priceOptionEmoji}>✍️</Text>
              <View style={styles.priceOptionText}>
                <Text style={styles.priceOptionTitle}>Custom Price</Text>
                <Text style={styles.priceOptionSubtext}>Set your own price</Text>
              </View>
              {priceOption === 'custom' ? (
                <TextInput
                  style={styles.customPriceInput}
                  value={customPrice}
                  onChangeText={handleCustomPriceChange}
                  placeholder="0.00"
                  placeholderTextColor={colors.surface.onSurfaceVariant}
                  keyboardType="decimal-pad"
                  autoFocus
                />
              ) : (
                <Text style={styles.priceOptionPrice}>$__.__</Text>
              )}
            </View>
          </TouchableOpacity>
        </Card>

        {/* Description and Details - Collapsible */}
        <Card>
          <TouchableOpacity
            style={styles.detailsHeader}
            onPress={() => setShowDetails(!showDetails)}
          >
            <Text style={styles.cardTitle}>📝 Description & Details</Text>
            <Text style={styles.expandIcon}>{showDetails ? '▼' : '▶'}</Text>
          </TouchableOpacity>

          {showDetails && (
            <View style={styles.detailsContent}>
              <Text style={styles.inputLabel}>Category</Text>
              <View style={styles.readOnlyField}>
                <Text style={styles.readOnlyText}>
                  {structuredData.category || 'Auto-detected on listing'}
                </Text>
              </View>

              <Text style={styles.inputLabel}>Condition</Text>
              <View style={styles.readOnlyField}>
                <Text style={styles.readOnlyText}>
                  {structuredData.condition || 'Very Good'}
                </Text>
              </View>

              <Text style={styles.inputLabel}>Description</Text>
              <TextInput
                style={styles.descriptionInput}
                value={itemDescription}
                onChangeText={setItemDescription}
                placeholder="Enter a detailed description of your item"
                placeholderTextColor={colors.surface.onSurfaceVariant}
                multiline
                numberOfLines={6}
                textAlignVertical="top"
              />
              <Text style={styles.helperText}>
                A detailed description helps buyers make confident decisions
              </Text>
            </View>
          )}
        </Card>

        {/* eBay Authorization Status */}
        {checkingAuth ? (
          <Card>
            <ActivityIndicator size="small" color={colors.primary.main} />
            <Text style={styles.statusText}>Checking eBay authorization...</Text>
          </Card>
        ) : (
          <Card style={isEbayLinked ? styles.linkedCard : styles.notLinkedCard}>
            <Text style={styles.statusEmoji}>{isEbayLinked ? '✅' : '🔗'}</Text>
            <Text style={styles.statusTitle}>
              {isEbayLinked ? 'eBay Account Linked' : 'eBay Authorization Required'}
            </Text>
            <Text style={styles.statusMessage}>
              {isEbayLinked 
                ? 'Your eBay account is connected and ready to list items.'
                : 'To list items, you need to authorize your eBay account first.'}
            </Text>
            {!isEbayLinked && (
              <TouchableOpacity
                style={styles.authorizeButton}
                onPress={handleEbayAuthorization}
              >
                <Text style={styles.authorizeButtonText}>Authorize eBay Account</Text>
              </TouchableOpacity>
            )}
          </Card>
        )}

        {/* Security & Trust Badge */}
        <View style={styles.trustBadge}>
          <Text style={styles.trustBadgeText}>
            🔒 Securely powered by eBay's official API
          </Text>
        </View>
      </ScrollView>

      {/* Material Design Fixed Bottom Action Button */}
      <View style={styles.bottomAction}>
        <Button
          variant="filled"
          onPress={handleListOnEbay}
          style={styles.listButton}
          disabled={isListing}
          loading={isListing}
        >
          {isEbayLinked ? 'List Item on eBay' : 'Authorize & List'}
        </Button>
      </View>
    </View>
  );
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container: {
    flex: 1,
    backgroundColor: colors.background.main,
    ...(Platform.OS === 'web' && {
      display: 'flex',
      flexDirection: 'column',
      height: '100%',
    }),
  },
  header: {
    flexDirection: 'row',
    alignItems: 'center',
    justifyContent: 'space-between',
    paddingHorizontal: spacing.md,
    paddingTop: spacing.xl,
    paddingBottom: spacing.md,
    backgroundColor: colors.surface.main,
    ...elevation.level4,
  },

    width: 40,

    position: 'absolute',
    bottom: 0,
    left: 0,
    right: 0,
    backgroundColor: colors.surface.main,
    padding: spacing.md,
    ...elevation.level8,
  },
  listButton: {
    width: '100%',
  },
});

================
File: appraisal-mobile/src/screens/ListSuccessScreen.js
================
import React from 'react';
import {
  View,
  Text,
  StyleSheet,
  ScrollView,
  TouchableOpacity,
  Linking,
  Platform,
} from 'react-native';
import { StatusBar } from 'expo-status-bar';
import { useSafeAreaInsets } from 'react-native-safe-area-context';
import Button from '../components/Button';
import Card from '../components/Card';
import { colors, typography, spacing, borderRadius } from '../constants/theme';

/**
 * ListSuccessScreen - Confirmation screen after successful eBay listing
 * 
 * Displays:
 * - Success confirmation
 * - eBay listing URL
 * - Item ID
 * - Next action options
 */
export default function ListSuccessScreen({ route, navigation }) {
  const { itemId, listingUrl, title, price } = route.params;
  const insets = useSafeAreaInsets();
  
  // Calculate proper bottom padding: tab bar (80px) + safe area + fixed button + breathing room
  const scrollBottomPadding = 80 + insets.bottom + 120;

  const handleViewOnEbay = () => {
    if (listingUrl) {
      Linking.openURL(listingUrl).catch((err) =>
        console.error('Failed to open URL:', err)
      );
    }
  };

  const handleListAnother = () => {
    // Navigate back to camera screen to list another item
    navigation.navigate('Camera');
  };

  const handleViewHistory = () => {
    // Navigate to history screen (if implemented)
    navigation.navigate('History');
  };

  return (
    <View style={styles.container}>
      <StatusBar barStyle="dark-content" />
      
      <ScrollView 
        style={styles.scrollView}
        contentContainerStyle={[styles.scrollContent, { paddingBottom: scrollBottomPadding }]}
        showsVerticalScrollIndicator={false}
        {...(Platform.OS !== 'web' && {
          scrollEventThrottle: 16,
          nestedScrollEnabled: true,
        })}
      >
        {/* Success Header */}
        <View style={styles.successHeader}>
          <View style={styles.successIcon}>
            <Text style={styles.successIconText}>✅</Text>
          </View>
          <Text style={styles.successTitle}>Listed Successfully!</Text>
          <Text style={styles.successSubtitle}>
            Your item is now live on eBay
          </Text>
        </View>

        {/* Listing Details */}
        <Card>
          <Text style={styles.cardTitle}>Listing Details</Text>
          
          <View style={styles.detailRow}>
            <Text style={styles.detailLabel}>Title:</Text>
            <Text style={styles.detailValue}>{title}</Text>
          </View>
          
          <View style={styles.detailRow}>
            <Text style={styles.detailLabel}>Price:</Text>
            <Text style={styles.detailValue}>${parseFloat(price).toFixed(2)}</Text>
          </View>
          
          <View style={styles.detailRow}>
            <Text style={styles.detailLabel}>Item ID:</Text>
            <Text style={styles.detailValue}>{itemId}</Text>
          </View>
          
          <View style={styles.detailRow}>
            <Text style={styles.detailLabel}>Status:</Text>
            <View style={styles.statusBadge}>
              <Text style={styles.statusText}>Active</Text>
            </View>
          </View>
        </Card>

        {/* Quick Actions */}
        <Card>
          <Text style={styles.cardTitle}>Quick Actions</Text>
          
          <TouchableOpacity
            style={styles.actionButton}
            onPress={handleViewOnEbay}
          >
            <Text style={styles.actionIcon}>🔗</Text>
            <View style={styles.actionContent}>
              <Text style={styles.actionTitle}>View on eBay</Text>
              <Text style={styles.actionSubtitle}>See your live listing</Text>
            </View>
            <Text style={styles.actionArrow}>→</Text>
          </TouchableOpacity>
          
          <TouchableOpacity
            style={styles.actionButton}
            onPress={handleListAnother}
          >
            <Text style={styles.actionIcon}>📷</Text>
            <View style={styles.actionContent}>
              <Text style={styles.actionTitle}>List Another Item</Text>
              <Text style={styles.actionSubtitle}>Appraise more items</Text>
            </View>
            <Text style={styles.actionArrow}>→</Text>
          </TouchableOpacity>
        </Card>

        {/* Info Card */}
        <Card style={styles.infoCard}>
          <Text style={styles.infoIcon}>💡</Text>
          <Text style={styles.infoTitle}>What's Next?</Text>
          <Text style={styles.infoText}>
            • Your listing is now visible to millions of buyers{'\n'}
            • You'll receive notifications when someone purchases{'\n'}
            • Ship the item within 3 business days after sale{'\n'}
            • Funds will be transferred after delivery confirmation
          </Text>
        </Card>
      </ScrollView>

      {/* Fixed Bottom Button */}
      <View style={styles.bottomAction}>
        <Button
          variant="primary"
          onPress={handleListAnother}
        >
          List Another Item
        </Button>
      </View>
    </View>
  );
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container: {
    flex: 1,
    backgroundColor: colors.surface.surfaceContainer,
    ...(Platform.OS === 'web' && {
      display: 'flex',
      flexDirection: 'column',
      height: '100%',
    }),
  },
  scrollView: {
    flex: 1,
  },
  scrollContent: {
    padding: spacing.md,
    // paddingBottom is set dynamically per device
  },
  successHeader: {
    alignItems: 'center',
    paddingVertical: spacing['2xl'],
  },
  successIcon: {
    width: 80,
    height: 80,
    borderRadius: 40,
    backgroundColor: colors.success[100],
    alignItems: 'center',
    justifyContent: 'center',
    marginBottom: spacing.lg,
  },

File: appraisal-mobile/src/screens/ResultsScreen.js
================
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import {
  View,
  Text,
  StyleSheet,
  ScrollView,
  TouchableOpacity,
  Image,
  Alert,
  Platform,
} from 'react-native';
import { StatusBar } from 'expo-status-bar';
import { MaterialIcons } from '@expo/vector-icons';
import { useSafeAreaInsets } from 'react-native-safe-area-context';
import Button from '../components/Button';
import Card from '../components/Card';
import RippleCard from '../components/RippleCard';
import InfoRow from '../components/InfoRow';
import TopAppBar from '../components/TopAppBar';
import { colors, typography, spacing, borderRadius, elevation } from '../constants/theme';

export default function ResultsScreen({ route, navigation }) {
  const { result, imageUri } = route.params;
  const [decision, setDecision] = useState(null);
  const [selectedPrice, setSelectedPrice] = useState('quick'); // Default to quick sell
  const insets = useSafeAreaInsets();
  
  // CRITICAL: Calculate proper spacing for action bar positioning
  // On web mobile (< 840px), tab bar is at bottom (80px + safe area)
  // Action bar height is ~72px, so total reserved space at bottom is ~152px + safe area
  const tabBarHeight = 80;
  const actionBarHeight = 72;
  const scrollBottomPadding = tabBarHeight + actionBarHeight + insets.bottom + 20;

  const structuredData = result.structured_data || {};
  const quickSellPrice = result.quicksell_price || 'N/A';
  const patientSellPrice = result.patient_sell_price || 'N/A';
  const description = result.description || 'No description available';
  const listingsCount = result.listings_count || 0;
  const sellTimeEstimate = result.sell_time_estimate || 'Unknown';

  const handleDecision = (choice) => {
    setDecision(choice);
    
    if (choice === 'sell') {
      // Navigate to ListOnEbayScreen with result and image data
      navigation.navigate('ListOnEbay', { result, imageUri });
    } else {
      // Keep functionality remains the same
      Alert.alert(
        '💾 Saved to Keep',
        'Item marked to keep. You can always analyze another item.',
        [
          {
            text: 'Analyze Another Item',
            onPress: () => navigation.navigate('Camera'),
          },
          {
            text: 'OK',
            style: 'cancel',
          },
        ]
      );
    }
  };

  const formatPrice = (price) => {
    if (typeof price === 'number') {
      return `$${price.toFixed(2)}`;
    }
    return price;
  };

  return (
    <View style={styles.container}>
      <StatusBar barStyle="dark-content" />
      
      {/* Material Design Top App Bar with proper back button */}
      <TopAppBar 
        title={`${structuredData.brand || ''} ${structuredData.item_type || 'Appraisal'}`.trim() || 'Appraisal Results'}
        onBack={() => navigation.goBack()}
      />

      <ScrollView 
        style={styles.scrollView}
        contentContainerStyle={[styles.scrollContent, { paddingBottom: scrollBottomPadding }]}
        showsVerticalScrollIndicator={false}
        {...(Platform.OS !== 'web' && {
          scrollEventThrottle: 16,
          nestedScrollEnabled: true,
        })}
      >
        {/* Item Image */}
        {imageUri && (
          <Image source={{ uri: imageUri }} style={styles.image} />
        )}

        {/* Pricing Analysis - Side-by-side Material Cards */}
        <View style={styles.sectionHeader}>
          <MaterialIcons name="attach-money" size={24} color={colors.primary.main} />
          <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>Pricing Analysis</Text>
        </View>
        <View style={styles.pricingContainer}>
          <RippleCard
            style={[
              styles.priceCard,
              selectedPrice === 'quick' && styles.priceCardSelected
            ]}
            elevation={selectedPrice === 'quick' ? 'level4' : 'level2'}
            onPress={() => setSelectedPrice('quick')}
            interactive={true}
          >
            <View style={styles.priceCardContent}>
              <Text style={styles.priceLabel}>Quick Sell</Text>
              <Text style={styles.priceValueLarge}>{formatPrice(quickSellPrice)}</Text>
              <Text style={styles.priceSubtext}>~7 days to sell</Text>
              <View style={styles.priceBadge}>
                <Text style={styles.priceBadgeText}>FAST</Text>
              </View>
            </View>
          </RippleCard>
          
          <RippleCard
            style={[
              styles.priceCard,
              selectedPrice === 'patient' && styles.priceCardSelected
            ]}
            elevation={selectedPrice === 'patient' ? 'level4' : 'level2'}
            onPress={() => setSelectedPrice('patient')}
            interactive={true}
          >
            <View style={styles.priceCardContent}>
              <Text style={styles.priceLabel}>Patient Sell</Text>
              <Text style={styles.priceValueLarge}>{formatPrice(patientSellPrice)}</Text>
              <Text style={styles.priceSubtext}>{sellTimeEstimate}</Text>
              <View style={[styles.priceBadge, styles.priceBadgeSecondary]}>
                <Text style={styles.priceBadgeText}>MAX VALUE</Text>
              </View>
            </View>
          </RippleCard>
        </View>
        <Text style={styles.marketInfo}>
          📊 Based on {listingsCount} similar eBay listings
        </Text>

        {/* AI Analysis Card - Elevated with proper containment */}
        <Card elevation="level2" style={styles.analysisCard}>
          <View style={styles.cardHeader}>
            <MaterialIcons name="auto-awesome" size={24} color={colors.primary.main} />
            <Text style={styles.cardTitle}>AI Analysis</Text>
          </View>
          <Text style={styles.descriptionText}>{description}</Text>
        </Card>

        {/* Item Details Card */}
        <Card>
          <Text style={styles.cardTitle}>Item Details</Text>
          <InfoRow 
            label="Type" 
            value={structuredData.item_type || 'N/A'} 
          />
          <InfoRow 
            label="Brand" 
            value={structuredData.brand || 'N/A'} 
          />
          {structuredData.model && (
            <InfoRow 
              label="Model" 
              value={structuredData.model} 
            />
          )}
          <InfoRow 
            label="Condition" 
            value={structuredData.condition || 'N/A'} 
            style={styles.lastInfoRow}
          />
        </Card>

        {/* Decision Section - Simplified */}
        <Card>
          <Text style={styles.cardTitle}>What would you like to do?</Text>
          <Text style={styles.decisionSubtitle}>
            Choose to list this item on eBay or keep it for your collection
          </Text>
        </Card>

        {/* Bottom Spacing for Action Bar */}
        <View style={styles.bottomSpacer} />
      </ScrollView>

      {/* Material Design Action Bar - Fixed bottom with primary actions */}
      <View style={styles.actionBar}>
        <Button 
          variant="outlined"
          onPress={() => handleDecision('keep')}
          style={styles.actionButtonSecondary}
          icon={<MaterialIcons name="favorite-border" size={20} color={colors.primary.main} />}
        >
          Keep It
        </Button>
        <Button 
          variant="filled"
          onPress={() => handleDecision('sell')}
          style={styles.actionButtonPrimary}
          icon={<MaterialIcons name="sell" size={20} color={colors.primary.onPrimary} />}
        >
          List on eBay
        </Button>
      </View>
    </View>
  );
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container: {
    flex: 1,
    backgroundColor: colors.background.main,
    // Web: use flexbox column layout for proper scroll
    ...(Platform.OS === 'web' && {
      display: 'flex',

      height: '100%',
    }),
  },

import React from 'react';
import {
  View,
  Text,
  StyleSheet,
  ScrollView,
  TouchableOpacity,
  Linking,
  Platform,
} from 'react-native';
import { StatusBar } from 'expo-status-bar';
import { useSafeAreaInsets } from 'react-native-safe-area-context';
import Card from '../components/Card';
import ResponsiveContainer from '../components/ResponsiveContainer';
import TopAppBar from '../components/TopAppBar';
import { colors, typography, spacing, borderRadius } from '../constants/theme';

/**
 * SettingsScreen - App configuration and information
 * Placeholder for future features (account, preferences, help)
 */
export default function SettingsScreen() {
  const APP_VERSION = '1.0.0';
  const insets = useSafeAreaInsets();
  
  // Calculate proper bottom padding: tab bar (80px) + safe area + breathing room
  const scrollBottomPadding = 80 + insets.bottom + spacing.xl;

  const handleLinkPress = (url) => {
    Linking.openURL(url).catch((err) => 
      console.error('Failed to open URL:', err)
    );
  };

  return (
    <ResponsiveContainer maxWidth={600} style={styles.container}>
      <StatusBar barStyle="dark-content" />
      
      {/* Material Design Top App Bar */}
      <TopAppBar 
        title="Settings" 
        subtitle="App preferences and information"
      />

      <ScrollView 
        style={styles.scrollView}
        contentContainerStyle={[styles.scrollContent, { paddingBottom: scrollBottomPadding }]}
        {...(Platform.OS !== 'web' && {
          scrollEventThrottle: 16,
          nestedScrollEnabled: true,
        })}
      >
        {/* About Section */}
        <Card>
          <Text style={styles.cardTitle}>About ValueSnap</Text>
          <View style={styles.infoRow}>
            <Text style={styles.infoLabel}>Version</Text>
            <Text style={styles.infoValue}>{APP_VERSION}</Text>
          </View>
          <View style={styles.divider} />
          <Text style={styles.aboutText}>
            ValueSnap uses AI-powered image analysis and real-time market data 
            to provide accurate appraisals for your items. Powered by OpenAI 
            and eBay market intelligence.
          </Text>
        </Card>

        {/* Future Features Placeholder */}
        <Card>
          <Text style={styles.cardTitle}>Coming Soon</Text>
          <Text style={styles.placeholderText}>
            • Account Management{'\n'}
            • Appraisal History Export{'\n'}
            • Custom Price Alerts{'\n'}
            • Offline Mode
          </Text>
        </Card>

        {/* Support Section */}
        <Card>
          <Text style={styles.cardTitle}>Support & Legal</Text>
          <TouchableOpacity 
            style={styles.linkButton}
            onPress={() => handleLinkPress('https://github.com')}
          >
            <Text style={styles.linkText}>Privacy Policy</Text>
            <Text style={styles.chevron}>›</Text>
          </TouchableOpacity>
          <View style={styles.divider} />
          <TouchableOpacity 
            style={styles.linkButton}
            onPress={() => handleLinkPress('https://github.com')}
          >
            <Text style={styles.linkText}>Terms of Service</Text>
            <Text style={styles.chevron}>›</Text>
          </TouchableOpacity>
          <View style={styles.divider} />
          <TouchableOpacity 
            style={styles.linkButton}
            onPress={() => handleLinkPress('mailto:support@valuesnap.app')}
          >
            <Text style={styles.linkText}>Contact Support</Text>
            <Text style={styles.chevron}>›</Text>
          </TouchableOpacity>
        </Card>

        {/* Security Badge */}

      </ScrollView>
    </ResponsiveContainer>
  );
}

File: appraisal-mobile/src/services/api.js

/**
 * API Service for communicating with the Flask backend
 */

// Backend URL - change this to your backend URL when deploying
// For Expo Go on physical device, use your computer's local IP address
// For web, use localhost
const BACKEND_URL = __DEV__ 
  ? 'http://localhost:5000'  // Development - change to your IP for physical device testing
  : 'https://your-production-backend.com';  // Production

/**
 * Process an image and get pricing/description from backend
 * @param {string} imageBase64 - Base64 encoded image string
 * @returns {Promise<Object>} Analysis results with pricing and description
 */
export const processImage = async (imageBase64) => {
  try {
    const response = await fetch(`${BACKEND_URL}/process`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        image_base64: imageBase64,
      }),
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${response.status}`);
    }

    const data = await response.json();
    return data;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('API Error:', error);
    throw error;
  }
};

/**
 * Check if backend server is healthy
 * @returns {Promise<Object>} Health check response
 */
export const checkHealth = async () => {
  try {
    const response = await fetch(`${BACKEND_URL}/health`);
    const data = await response.json();
    return data;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Health check failed:', error);
    return { status: 'error', message: error.message };
  }
};

================
File: appraisal-mobile/src/services/apiV1.js
================
/**
 * Enhanced API Service for ValueSnap
 * Supports both legacy and v1 API with authentication and real-time WebSocket updates
 */

import AsyncStorage from '@react-native-async-storage/async-storage';
import io from 'socket.io-client';

// Backend URL configuration
// For web: use current host with port 5000 to avoid CORS issues
// For native: use localhost:5000
const BACKEND_URL = process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL 
  || (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.location 
    ? `${window.location.protocol}//${window.location.hostname}:5000`  // Web: same host, port 5000
    : 'http://localhost:5000');  // Native: localhost

const API_VERSION = 'v1';  // Can switch between 'legacy' and 'v1'
const TOKEN_KEY = '@appraisal_auth_token';
const USER_KEY = '@appraisal_user_id';

// ============================================================================
// Authentication
// ============================================================================
// ============================================================================

/**
 * Get stored authentication token
 */
export const getAuthToken = async () => {
  try {
    return await AsyncStorage.getItem(TOKEN_KEY);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error getting auth token:', error);
    return null;
  }
};

/**
 * Store authentication token
 */
export const setAuthToken = async (token) => {
  try {
    await AsyncStorage.setItem(TOKEN_KEY, token);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error storing auth token:', error);
  }
};

/**
 * Get stored user ID
 */
export const getUserId = async () => {
  try {
    return await AsyncStorage.getItem(USER_KEY);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error getting user ID:', error);
    return null;
  }
};

/**
 * Store user ID
 */
export const setUserId = async (userId) => {
  try {
    await AsyncStorage.setItem(USER_KEY, userId);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error storing user ID:', error);
  }
};

/**
 * Clear authentication data
 */
export const clearAuth = async () => {
  try {
    await AsyncStorage.multiRemove([TOKEN_KEY, USER_KEY]);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error clearing auth:', error);
  }
};

/**
 * Create a guest session (no signup required)
 */
export const createGuestSession = async () => {
  try {
    const response = await fetch(`${BACKEND_URL}/api/v1/auth/guest`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      },
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${response.status}`);
    }

    const data = await response.json();
    
    // Store token and user ID
    await setAuthToken(data.token);
    await setUserId(data.user_id);
    
    return data;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error creating guest session:', error);
    throw error;
  }
};

/**
 * Ensure user has a valid session (create guest if needed)
 */
export const ensureSession = async () => {
  const token = await getAuthToken();
  
  if (!token) {
    console.log('No auth token found, creating guest session...');
    await createGuestSession();
  }
  
  return getAuthToken();
};

// ============================================================================
// API Requests
// ============================================================================

/**
 * Make authenticated API request
 */
const authenticatedFetch = async (endpoint, options = {}) => {
  const token = await getAuthToken();
  
  if (!token) {
    throw new Error('No authentication token. Please create a session first.');
  }
  
  const headers = {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}`,
    ...options.headers,
  };
  
  const response = await fetch(endpoint, {
    ...options,
    headers,
  });
  
  // Handle token expiration
  if (response.status === 401) {
    console.log('Token expired, creating new session...');
    await clearAuth();
    await createGuestSession();
    
    // Retry request with new token
    const newToken = await getAuthToken();
    const retryResponse = await fetch(endpoint, {
      ...options,
      headers: {
        ...headers,
        'Authorization': `Bearer ${newToken}`,
      },
    });
    
    return retryResponse;
  }
  
  return response;
};

/**
 * Process an image and get appraisal data
 * @param {string} imageBase64 - Base64 encoded image string
 * @returns {Promise<Object>} Analysis results with pricing and description
 */
export const analyzeImage = async (imageBase64) => {
  try {
    const response = await fetch(`${BACKEND_URL}/process`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        image_base64: imageBase64,
      }),
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      const errorData = await response.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Unknown error' }));
      throw new Error(errorData.error || `HTTP error! status: ${response.status}`);
    }

    const data = await response.json();
    return data;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('API Error:', error);
    throw error;
  }
};

export const processImage = async (imageBase64) => {

      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        image_base64: imageBase64,
      }),
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${response.status}`);
    }

    const data = await response.json();
    return data;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('API Error:', error);
    throw error;
  }
};

// ============================================================================
// WebSocket Real-Time Analysis
// ============================================================================

/**
 * Analyze image with real-time progress updates via WebSocket
 * @param {string} imageBase64 - Base64 encoded image string
 * @param {function} onProgress - Callback for progress updates (status, step, total_steps)
 * @returns {Promise<Object>} Final analysis results
 */
export const analyzeImageWithProgress = async (imageBase64, onProgress) => {
  // Strip data URI prefix if present
  let cleanBase64 = imageBase64;
  if (imageBase64 && imageBase64.includes(',')) {
    cleanBase64 = imageBase64.split(',')[1];
  }
  
  onProgress({ status: 'Connecting to server...', step: 1, total_steps: 3 });
  
  onProgress({ status: 'Analyzing image with AI...', step: 2, total_steps: 3 });
  
  const response = await fetch(`${BACKEND_URL}/process`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: {
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    },
    body: JSON.stringify({
      image_base64: cleanBase64,
    }),
  });

  if (!response.ok) {
    throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${response.status}`);
  }

  const result = await response.json();
  
  onProgress({ status: 'Getting market data...', step: 3, total_steps: 3 });
  
  return result;
};

// Export API version for reference
export { BACKEND_URL, API_VERSION };
