/**
 * eBay Authentication Service
 * Handles OAuth flow for listing items on behalf of users
 */

import AsyncStorage from '@react-native-async-storage/async-storage';
import { getAuthToken } from './apiV1';

// Backend URL configuration
const BACKEND_URL = process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL 
  || (__DEV__ 
    ? (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.location 
      ? `${window.location.protocol}//${window.location.hostname}:5000`  // Web: same host
      : 'http://localhost:5000')  // Native: localhost
    : 'https://your-production-backend.com');  // Production

const EBAY_AUTH_STATE_KEY = '@ebay_auth_state';

/**
 * Check if user has linked their eBay account
 * @returns {Promise<Object>} eBay authorization status
 */
export const checkEbayAuthStatus = async () => {
  try {
    const token = await getAuthToken();
    
    if (!token) {
      throw new Error('Authentication required. Please create a session first.');
    }
    
    const response = await fetch(`${BACKEND_URL}/api/v1/ebay/auth/status`, {
      method: 'GET',
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}`,
        'ngrok-skip-browser-warning': '1',
      },
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      const errorData = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
      throw new Error(errorData.error || `Failed to check eBay authorization status (HTTP ${response.status})`);
    }

    const data = await response.json();
    return data;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error checking eBay auth status:', error);
    throw new Error(error.message || 'Unable to check eBay authorization status. Please try again.');
  }
};

/**
 * Initiate eBay OAuth authorization flow
 * @returns {Promise<Object>} Authorization URL and state
 */
export const initiateEbayAuth = async () => {
  try {
    const token = await getAuthToken();
    
    if (!token) {
      throw new Error('Authentication required. Please create a session first.');
    }
    
    const response = await fetch(`${BACKEND_URL}/api/v1/ebay/auth/initiate`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}`,
        'ngrok-skip-browser-warning': '1',
      },
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      const errorData = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
      throw new Error(errorData.error || `Failed to initiate eBay authorization (HTTP ${response.status})`);
    }

    const data = await response.json();
    
    // Store state for validation
    await AsyncStorage.setItem(EBAY_AUTH_STATE_KEY, data.state);
    
    return data;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error initiating eBay auth:', error);
    throw new Error(error.message || 'Unable to start eBay authorization. Please check your connection.');
  }
};

/**
 * Handle OAuth callback after user consent
 * @param {string} code - Authorization code from eBay
 * @param {string} state - State parameter for CSRF protection
 * @returns {Promise<Object>} Success status
 */
export const handleEbayAuthCallback = async (code, state) => {
  try {
    const token = await getAuthToken();
    
    if (!token) {
      throw new Error('No authentication token. Please create a session first.');
    }
    
    // Verify state matches
    const storedState = await AsyncStorage.getItem(EBAY_AUTH_STATE_KEY);
    if (storedState !== state) {
      throw new Error('Invalid state parameter - possible CSRF attack');
    }
    
    const response = await fetch(`${BACKEND_URL}/api/v1/ebay/auth/callback`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}`,
        'ngrok-skip-browser-warning': '1',
      },
      body: JSON.stringify({ code, state }),
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      const errorData = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
      throw new Error(errorData.error || `Failed to complete authorization (HTTP ${response.status})`);
    }

    const data = await response.json();
    
    // Clear stored state
    await AsyncStorage.removeItem(EBAY_AUTH_STATE_KEY);
    
    return data;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error handling eBay auth callback:', error);
    throw error;
  }
};

/**
 * Create an eBay listing
 * @param {Object} listingData - Listing details
 * @returns {Promise<Object>} Created listing details
 */
export const createEbayListing = async (listingData) => {
  try {
    const token = await getAuthToken();
    
    if (!token) {
      throw new Error('No authentication token. Please create a session first.');
    }
    
    const response = await fetch(`${BACKEND_URL}/api/v1/ebay/list`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'Authorization': `Bearer ${token}`,
        'ngrok-skip-browser-warning': '1',
      },
      body: JSON.stringify(listingData),
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      const errorData = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
      throw new Error(errorData.error || errorData.message || `Failed to create listing (HTTP ${response.status})`);
    }

    const data = await response.json();
    return data;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error creating eBay listing:', error);
    throw error;
  }
};

File: appraisal-mobile/src/services/storageService.js
================
/**
 * StorageService - Manages appraisal history with persistent image storage
 * Architecture: "Smart Save" - Compresses images (~90% reduction) and moves
 * them from temporary cache to permanent DocumentDirectory.
 * 
 * Why: Blob URLs expire on refresh, Base64 bloats AsyncStorage (10MB limit).
 * Solution: Store compressed JPEG files in FileSystem, reference by path.
 */
import AsyncStorage from '@react-native-async-storage/async-storage';
import * as FileSystem from 'expo-file-system';
import * as ImageManipulator from 'expo-image-manipulator';
import { Platform } from 'react-native';

const STORAGE_KEY = '@valuesnap_appraisals';

/**
 * Generate a unique ID for an appraisal
 */
const generateId = () => {
  return `appraisal_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
};

/**
 * Meticulously handles image persistence with compression and file system storage.
 * 
 * Process:
 * 1. Compress image to ~150KB (1080px width, 60% quality JPEG)
 * 2. Move from temp cache to permanent DocumentDirectory
 * 3. Return file:// path for reliable cross-session access
 * 
 * Benefits:
 * - 90% size reduction (3MB → 300KB typical)
 * - Survives app restarts and OS cache cleaning
 * - No AsyncStorage bloat (10MB limit preserved)
 * 
 * @param {string} tempUri - Temporary URI from ImagePicker (blob:, file:, or data:)
 * @returns {Promise<string>} - Permanent file:// path or original URI on web
 */
const persistImage = async (tempUri) => {
  // Web platform: Use browser caching (data: URIs work across sessions)
  if (Platform.OS === 'web') {
    return tempUri;
  }

  try {
    // 1. Compress & Resize (Max 1080px width, 60% quality JPEG)
    // This reduces 3MB photos to ~300KB while maintaining visual quality
    const manipulated = await ImageManipulator.manipulateAsync(
      tempUri,
      [{ resize: { width: 1080 } }],
      { compress: 0.6, format: ImageManipulator.SaveFormat.JPEG }
    );

    // 2. Generate permanent path in DocumentDirectory (survives app lifecycle)
    const fileName = `img_${Date.now()}.jpg`;
    const permanentPath = `${FileSystem.documentDirectory}${fileName}`;

    // 3. Atomic move operation (faster than copy + delete)
    await FileSystem.moveAsync({
      from: manipulated.uri,
      to: permanentPath,
    });

    console.log(`✓ Image persisted: ${fileName} (${(await FileSystem.getInfoAsync(permanentPath)).size} bytes)`);
    return permanentPath;
    
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('⚠ Image persistence failed, using temp URI:', error);
    return tempUri; // Graceful degradation
  }
};

/**
 * Save a new appraisal to history with persistent image storage
 * 
 * Smart Save Architecture:
 * - Compresses image before storage (90% size reduction)
 * - Stores compressed file in permanent DocumentDirectory
 * - Only stores file PATH in AsyncStorage (not the image itself)
 * 
 * @param {Object} appraisalData - The appraisal result data
 * @param {string} imageUri - Temporary URI of the appraised image
 * @returns {Promise<string>} - The ID of the saved appraisal
 */
export const saveAppraisal = async (appraisalData, imageUri) => {
  try {
    // Convert temporary URI to permanent file path (with compression)
    const permanentUri = await persistImage(imageUri);
    
    const appraisal = {
      id: generateId(),
      timestamp: Date.now(),
      result: appraisalData,
      imageUri: permanentUri, // Stores simple path: "file:///.../img_1234567890.jpg"
    };

    const existing = await getAllAppraisals();
    const updated = [appraisal, ...existing]; // Newest first
    
    await AsyncStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(updated));
    console.log('✓ Appraisal saved:', appraisal.id);
    
    return appraisal.id;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('✗ Error saving appraisal:', error);
    throw error;
  }
};

/**
 * Get all saved appraisals
 * @returns {Promise<Array>} - Array of appraisal objects
 */
export const getAllAppraisals = async () => {
  try {
    const data = await AsyncStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
    return data ? JSON.parse(data) : [];
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error getting appraisals:', error);
    return [];
  }
};

/**
 * Get a specific appraisal by ID
 * @param {string} id - The appraisal ID
 * @returns {Promise<Object|null>} - The appraisal object or null
 */
export const getAppraisalById = async (id) => {
  try {
    const appraisals = await getAllAppraisals();
    return appraisals.find(item => item.id === id) || null;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error getting appraisal by ID:', error);
    return null;
  }
};

/**
 * Delete an appraisal by ID with proper file cleanup
 * 
 * Critical: Also deletes the physical image file to prevent "Ghost Storage"
 * where deleted items still consume disk space.
 * 
 * @param {string} id - The appraisal ID to delete
 * @returns {Promise<boolean>} - Success status
 */
export const deleteAppraisal = async (id) => {
  try {
    const appraisals = await getAllAppraisals();
    const itemToDelete = appraisals.find(item => item.id === id);
    
    // Delete physical file if it exists in DocumentDirectory
    if (itemToDelete?.imageUri && itemToDelete.imageUri.startsWith('file://')) {
      try {
        await FileSystem.deleteAsync(itemToDelete.imageUri, { idempotent: true });
        console.log('✓ Physical file deleted:', itemToDelete.imageUri);
      } catch (fileError) {
        console.warn('⚠ File deletion failed (may not exist):', fileError.message);
      }
    }
    
    const filtered = appraisals.filter(item => item.id !== id);
    await AsyncStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(filtered));
    console.log('✓ Appraisal deleted:', id);
    
    return true;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('✗ Error deleting appraisal:', error);
    return false;
  }
};

/**
 * Clear all appraisals (use with caution)
 * @returns {Promise<boolean>} - Success status
 */
export const clearAllAppraisals = async () => {
  try {
    await AsyncStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEY);
    console.log('All appraisals cleared');
    return true;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error clearing appraisals:', error);
    return false;
  }
};

/**
 * Get appraisal count
 * @returns {Promise<number>} - Number of saved appraisals
 */
export const getAppraisalCount = async () => {
  try {
    const appraisals = await getAllAppraisals();
    return appraisals.length;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error getting appraisal count:', error);
    return 0;
  }
};

/**
 * Web-specific hover styles
 * 
 * Adds Material Design hover effects for web platform.
 * These are ignored on mobile/native platforms.
 */

import { Platform } from 'react-native';

/**
 * Button hover effect
 * Lifts button and increases shadow
 */
export const buttonHover = Platform.OS === 'web' ? {
  cursor: 'pointer',
  transition: 'all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0.0, 0.2, 1)',
  ':hover': {
    transform: 'translateY(-2px)',
    boxShadow: '0 4px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)',
  },
  ':active': {
    transform: 'translateY(0)',
  },
} : {};

/**
 * Card hover effect
 * Subtle lift and glow
 */
export const cardHover = Platform.OS === 'web' ? {
  cursor: 'pointer',
  transition: 'all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0.0, 0.2, 1)',
  ':hover': {
    transform: 'translateY(-4px)',
    boxShadow: '0 8px 24px rgba(103, 80, 164, 0.15)',
  },
} : {};

/**
 * Link hover effect
 * Underline and color change
 */
export const linkHover = Platform.OS === 'web' ? {
  cursor: 'pointer',
  transition: 'color 0.2s ease',
  ':hover': {
    textDecorationLine: 'underline',
    opacity: 0.8,
  },
} : {};

/**
 * Icon button hover effect
 * Background color change
 */
export const iconButtonHover = Platform.OS === 'web' ? {
  cursor: 'pointer',
  transition: 'background-color 0.2s ease',
  ':hover': {
    backgroundColor: 'rgba(103, 80, 164, 0.08)',
  },
} : {};

/**
 * Apply hover styles to web elements
 * Usage: style={[styles.button, hoverStyle(buttonHover)]}
 */
export function hoverStyle(styles) {
  if (Platform.OS !== 'web') return {};
  return styles;
}

/**
 * Create web-only inline style object with hover support
 * This requires dangerouslySetInlineStyle in React Native Web
 */
export function createWebHoverStyle(baseStyle, hoverStyle) {
  if (Platform.OS !== 'web') {
    return baseStyle;
  }

  return {
    ...baseStyle,
    cursor: 'pointer',
    transition: 'all 0.2s ease',
    ':hover': hoverStyle,
  };
}

================
File: appraisal-mobile/src/utils/responsive.js
================
import { Platform, useWindowDimensions } from 'react-native';

/**
 * Material Design 3 Breakpoints
 * 
 * Compact: 0-599dp (phones in portrait)
 * Medium: 600-839dp (tablets, phones in landscape)
 * Expanded: 840-1239dp (tablets in landscape, small desktops)
 * Large: 1240-1439dp (desktops)
 * Extra Large: 1440dp+ (large desktops)
 */
export const BREAKPOINTS = {
  compact: 0,
  medium: 600,
  expanded: 840,
  large: 1240,
  extraLarge: 1440,
};

/**
 * Hook to detect current breakpoint
 */
export function useBreakpoint() {
  const { width } = useWindowDimensions();
  const isWeb = Platform.OS === 'web';

  if (!isWeb) {
    return 'compact';
  }

  if (width >= BREAKPOINTS.extraLarge) return 'extraLarge';
  if (width >= BREAKPOINTS.large) return 'large';
  if (width >= BREAKPOINTS.expanded) return 'expanded';
  if (width >= BREAKPOINTS.medium) return 'medium';
  return 'compact';
}

/**
 * Hook to detect if desktop/web layout should be used
 */
export function useIsDesktop() {
  const { width } = useWindowDimensions();
  return Platform.OS === 'web' && width >= BREAKPOINTS.expanded;
}

/**
 * Responsive value selector
 * Returns different values based on breakpoint
 */
export function useResponsiveValue(values) {
  const breakpoint = useBreakpoint();
  
  if (values[breakpoint] !== undefined) {
    return values[breakpoint];
  }
  
  // Fallback to nearest available value
  const breakpointOrder = ['compact', 'medium', 'expanded', 'large', 'extraLarge'];
  const currentIndex = breakpointOrder.indexOf(breakpoint);
  
  for (let i = currentIndex; i >= 0; i--) {
    if (values[breakpointOrder[i]] !== undefined) {
      return values[breakpointOrder[i]];
    }
  }
  
  return Object.values(values)[0];
}

File: appraisal-mobile/src/utils/serviceWorkerRegistration.js

/**
 * Service Worker Registration for PWA
 * Handles installation, updates, and offline support
 */

export const registerServiceWorker = () => {
  if ('serviceWorker' in navigator && process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production') {
    window.addEventListener('load', () => {
      const swUrl = `${process.env.PUBLIC_URL}/service-worker.js`;

      navigator.serviceWorker
        .register(swUrl)
        .then((registration) => {
          console.log('✅ Service Worker registered:', registration);

          // Check for updates
          registration.addEventListener('updatefound', () => {
            const newWorker = registration.installing;
            
            newWorker.addEventListener('statechange', () => {
              if (newWorker.state === 'installed' && navigator.serviceWorker.controller) {
                // New content available, show update notification
                if (confirm('New version available! Reload to update?')) {
                  newWorker.postMessage({ type: 'SKIP_WAITING' });
                  window.location.reload();
                }
              }
            });
          });
        })
        .catch((error) => {
          console.error('❌ Service Worker registration failed:', error);
        });

      // Handle controller change
      navigator.serviceWorker.addEventListener('controllerchange', () => {
        window.location.reload();
      });
    });
  }
};

export const unregisterServiceWorker = () => {
  if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) {
    navigator.serviceWorker.ready
      .then((registration) => {
        registration.unregister();
      })
      .catch((error) => {
        console.error('Error unregistering service worker:', error);
      });
  }
};

// Check if app is running in standalone mode (installed as PWA)
export const isStandalone = () => {
  return window.matchMedia('(display-mode: standalone)').matches ||
         window.navigator.standalone === true;
};

// Request persistent storage
export const requestPersistentStorage = async () => {
  if (navigator.storage && navigator.storage.persist) {
    const isPersisted = await navigator.storage.persist();
    console.log(`Persistent storage: ${isPersisted ? 'granted' : 'denied'}`);
    return isPersisted;
  }
  return false;
};

// Clear all caches
export const clearAllCaches = async () => {
  if ('caches' in window) {
    const cacheNames = await caches.keys();
    await Promise.all(cacheNames.map(name => caches.delete(name)));
    console.log('All caches cleared');
  }
  
  // Also notify service worker
  if (navigator.serviceWorker.controller) {
    navigator.serviceWorker.controller.postMessage({ type: 'CLEAR_CACHE' });
  }
};

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <meta httpEquiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge" />
  
  <!-- Primary Meta Tags -->
  <title>ValueSnap - AI Estate Appraisals | Instant eBay Market Valuations</title>
  <meta name="title" content="ValueSnap - AI Estate Appraisals | Instant eBay Market Valuations" />
  <meta name="description" content="AI-powered estate inventory appraisal system with real-time eBay market valuations. Snap photos and get instant pricing powered by GPT-4. Fast, accurate, and easy to use." />

  <meta name="robots" content="index, follow" />
  
  <!-- Viewport -->
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=5.0, minimum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=yes, viewport-fit=cover" />
  
  <!-- Theme Color -->

  <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes" />

  <!-- Preconnect to improve performance -->
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
  
  <!-- Canonical URL -->
  <link rel="canonical" href="https://valuesnap.app/" />
  
  <!-- Structured Data for SEO -->
  <script type="application/ld+json">
  {
    "@context": "https://schema.org",
    "@type": "WebApplication",
    "name": "ValueSnap",
    "alternateName": "ValueSnap - AI Estate Appraisals",
    "description": "AI-powered estate inventory appraisal system with real-time eBay market valuations. Snap photos and get instant pricing powered by GPT-4.",
    "url": "https://valuesnap.app",
    "applicationCategory": "BusinessApplication",
    "operatingSystem": "Any",
    "offers": {
      "@type": "Offer",
      "price": "0",
      "priceCurrency": "USD"
    },
    "browserRequirements": "Requires JavaScript. Requires HTML5.",
    "softwareVersion": "1.0.0",
    "author": {
      "@type": "Organization",
      "name": "ValueSnap"
    },
    "screenshot": "/assets/splash-icon.png"
  }
  </script>
  
  <!-- Performance optimization -->
  <style>
    /* 1. FORCE NATURAL SCROLLING - The Nuclear Web Fix */
    html {
      height: 100%;
      overflow-y: auto; /* Always allow vertical scrolling */
      -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%;
    }
    
    body {
      height: auto;
      min-height: 100%;
      width: 100%;
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'Roboto', 'Oxygen', 'Ubuntu', 'Cantarell', 'Fira Sans', 'Droid Sans', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif;
      -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
      -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
      background-color: #F3F4F6; /* Match app background */
    }
    
    /* 2. UNLOCK THE ROOT CONTAINER */
    /* React Native usually sets this to height: 100%, which locks the viewport */
    #root {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      min-height: 100vh; /* Allow growing beyond viewport */
      width: 100%;
    }
    
    /* 3. DISABLE ARIA-HIDDEN INTERFERENCE */
    /* This prevents React Navigation from accidentally hiding active content */
    [aria-hidden="true"] {
      display: flex !important;
      pointer-events: auto !important;
    }
    
    /* Loading spinner */
    .loading-container {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      align-items: center;
      min-height: 100vh;
      background-color: #FFFBFE;
    }
    
    .loading-spinner {
      width: 48px;
      height: 48px;
      border: 4px solid #E8DEF8;
      border-top-color: #6750A4;
      border-radius: 50%;
      animation: spin 1s linear infinite;
    }
    
    @keyframes spin {
      to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
    }
    
    /* Prevent layout shift */
    * {
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }
  </style>
</head>

    <div style="padding: 20px; text-align: center; font-family: sans-serif;">

// CRITICAL: Import gesture-handler FIRST - Required for React Navigation
import 'react-native-gesture-handler';

import React, { useEffect, useState, Component } from 'react';
import { StatusBar } from 'expo-status-bar';
import { Platform, View, Text, TouchableOpacity, StyleSheet, LogBox } from 'react-native';
import { GestureHandlerRootView } from 'react-native-gesture-handler';
import { NavigationContainer } from '@react-navigation/native';
import { createStackNavigator } from '@react-navigation/stack';
import { createBottomTabNavigator, BottomTabBar } from '@react-navigation/bottom-tabs';
import { SafeAreaProvider } from 'react-native-safe-area-context';
import { MaterialIcons } from '@expo/vector-icons';
import * as Font from 'expo-font';
import {
  useFonts,
  Roboto_300Light,
  Roboto_400Regular,
  Roboto_500Medium,
  Roboto_700Bold,
} from '@expo-google-fonts/roboto';

// Ignore specific non-critical warnings (these are from internal RN components, not our code)
LogBox.ignoreLogs([
  'props.pointerEvents is deprecated',  // React Native internal - use style.pointerEvents
  'Props.pointerEvents is deprecated',  // Alternate casing
  'Running "main" with appParams',      // Expo startup message
  '"shadow*" style props are deprecated', // Web shadow warning
]);

// Error Boundary for catching React errors
class ErrorBoundary extends Component {
  constructor(props) {
    super(props);
    this.state = { hasError: false, error: null, errorInfo: null };
  }

  static getDerivedStateFromError(error) {
    return { hasError: true };
  }

  componentDidCatch(error, errorInfo) {
    console.error('🔴 React Error Boundary caught:', error, errorInfo);
    this.setState({ error, errorInfo });
  }

  render() {
    if (this.state.hasError) {
      return (
        <View style={{ 
          flex: 1, 
          justifyContent: 'center', 
          alignItems: 'center', 
          padding: 32, 
          backgroundColor: '#FFFBFE'
        }}>
          <View style={{
            backgroundColor: '#FFF',
            padding: 24,
            borderRadius: 16,
            maxWidth: 600,
            width: '100%',
            shadowColor: '#000',
            shadowOffset: { width: 0, height: 2 },
            shadowOpacity: 0.1,
            shadowRadius: 8,
            elevation: 4,
          }}>
            <Text style={{ 
              fontSize: 28, 
              fontWeight: '700', 
              color: '#6750A4', 
              marginBottom: 16,
              textAlign: 'center',
            }}>
              ⚠️ Something went wrong
            </Text>
            <Text style={{ 
              fontSize: 16, 
              color: '#49454F', 
              textAlign: 'center', 
              marginBottom: 24,
              lineHeight: 24,
            }}>
              The app encountered an unexpected error. Please refresh the page to try again.
            </Text>
            {Platform.OS === 'web' && (
              <TouchableOpacity
                onPress={() => window.location.reload()}
                style={{
                  backgroundColor: '#6750A4',
                  paddingVertical: 12,
                  paddingHorizontal: 24,
                  borderRadius: 100,
                  alignSelf: 'center',
                }}
              >
                <Text style={{ color: '#FFF', fontSize: 14, fontWeight: '600' }}>
                  Reload Page
                </Text>
              </TouchableOpacity>
            )}
          </View>
        </View>
      );
    }

    return this.props.children;
  }
}

// Import screens and theme
import CameraScreen from './src/screens/CameraScreen';
import ResultsScreen from './src/screens/ResultsScreen';
import HistoryScreen from './src/screens/HistoryScreen';
import SettingsScreen from './src/screens/SettingsScreen';
import ListOnEbayScreen from './src/screens/ListOnEbayScreen';
import ListSuccessScreen from './src/screens/ListSuccessScreen';
import ResponsiveTabBar from './src/components/ResponsiveTabBar';
import DesktopContentWrapper from './src/components/DesktopContentWrapper';
import { colors, typography, spacing, elevation, borderRadius } from './src/constants/theme';
import { useWindowDimensions } from 'react-native';

// CRITICAL FIX: Create navigators OUTSIDE component definitions
// Each createStackNavigator() / createBottomTabNavigator() call creates a unique context
// Creating them here ensures they're only instantiated ONCE during the module's lifetime
const AppraiseStackNavigator = createStackNavigator();
const MainTabNavigator = createBottomTabNavigator();

// --- STABLE WRAPPER COMPONENTS ---
// Using React.memo to prevent unnecessary re-renders during hot reload
// This is the KEY fix for "Couldn't register the navigator" errors
const CameraScreenWrapped = React.memo((props) => (
  <DesktopContentWrapper><CameraScreen {...props} /></DesktopContentWrapper>
));
CameraScreenWrapped.displayName = 'CameraScreenWrapped';

const ResultsScreenWrapped = React.memo((props) => (
  <DesktopContentWrapper><ResultsScreen {...props} /></DesktopContentWrapper>
));
ResultsScreenWrapped.displayName = 'ResultsScreenWrapped';

const ListOnEbayScreenWrapped = React.memo((props) => (
  <DesktopContentWrapper><ListOnEbayScreen {...props} /></DesktopContentWrapper>
));
ListOnEbayScreenWrapped.displayName = 'ListOnEbayScreenWrapped';

const ListSuccessScreenWrapped = React.memo((props) => (
  <DesktopContentWrapper><ListSuccessScreen {...props} /></DesktopContentWrapper>
));
ListSuccessScreenWrapped.displayName = 'ListSuccessScreenWrapped';

const HistoryScreenWrapped = React.memo((props) => (
  <DesktopContentWrapper><HistoryScreen {...props} /></DesktopContentWrapper>
));
HistoryScreenWrapped.displayName = 'HistoryScreenWrapped';

const SettingsScreenWrapped = React.memo((props) => (
  <DesktopContentWrapper><SettingsScreen {...props} /></DesktopContentWrapper>
));
SettingsScreenWrapped.displayName = 'SettingsScreenWrapped';

/**
 * Appraise Tab Stack - Contains the camera/selection, results, and eBay listing flow
 * Using React.memo to prevent navigator re-registration during hot reload
 */
const AppraiseStack = React.memo(() => {
  return (
    <AppraiseStackNavigator.Navigator 
      // WEB FIX: Disable react-native-screens on web to prevent aria-hidden issues
      {...(Platform.OS === 'web' && { detachInactiveScreens: false })}
      screenOptions={{ 
        headerShown: false,
        // Disable animations on web to prevent scroll locking issues
        animationEnabled: Platform.OS !== 'web',
        // WEB FIX: Ensure screens are not hidden from assistive technology
        ...(Platform.OS === 'web' && {
          cardStyle: { overflow: 'visible' },
        }),
      }}
    >
      <AppraiseStackNavigator.Screen name="Camera" component={CameraScreenWrapped} />
      <AppraiseStackNavigator.Screen name="Results" component={ResultsScreenWrapped} />
      <AppraiseStackNavigator.Screen name="ListOnEbay" component={ListOnEbayScreenWrapped} />
      <AppraiseStackNavigator.Screen name="ListSuccess" component={ListSuccessScreenWrapped} />
    </AppraiseStackNavigator.Navigator>
  );
});
AppraiseStack.displayName = 'AppraiseStack';



/**
 * Main Tab Navigator with Adaptive Layout
 * 
 * Using React.memo to prevent re-registration during hot reload
 * This is critical for avoiding "Couldn't register the navigator" errors
 */
const MainTabs = React.memo(() => {
  return (
    <View style={{ flex: 1, backgroundColor: colors.background.main }}>
      <MainTabNavigator.Navigator
        // CRITICAL: Use the stable component (not inline function)
        tabBar={(props) => <ResponsiveTabBar {...props} />}
        // WEB FIX: Disable react-native-screens on web to prevent aria-hidden issues
        // This uses regular Views instead of native screen containers
        {...(Platform.OS === 'web' && { detachInactiveScreens: false })}
        screenOptions={{
          headerShown: false,
          tabBarActiveTintColor: colors.primary.main,
          tabBarInactiveTintColor: colors.surface.onSurfaceVariant,
          // Keep tabs alive to prevent layout thrashing
          lazy: false,
          // Disable animations on web to prevent scroll issues
          animationEnabled: Platform.OS !== 'web',
          // WEB FIX: Comprehensive accessibility and scroll fixes
          ...(Platform.OS === 'web' && {
            freezeOnBlur: false,
            unmountOnBlur: false,
            // CRITICAL: Override React Navigation's default overflow:hidden
            // This is the root cause of scroll being blocked on web
            sceneStyle: { 
              flex: 1,
              overflow: 'auto', // Allow scrolling within scenes
            },
            // Also set on the container that holds all scenes
            sceneContainerStyle: {
              flex: 1,
              overflow: 'visible', // Don't clip scenes
            },
          }),
        }}
      >
        <MainTabNavigator.Screen 
          name="AppraiseStack" 
          component={AppraiseStack}
          options={{
            tabBarLabel: 'Appraise',
            tabBarIcon: ({ color }) => (
              <MaterialIcons name="camera-alt" size={24} color={color} />
            ),
          }}
        />
        <MainTabNavigator.Screen 
          name="History" 
          component={HistoryScreenWrapped}
          options={{
            tabBarLabel: 'History',
            tabBarIcon: ({ color }) => (
              <MaterialIcons name="history" size={24} color={color} />
            ),
          }}
        />
        <MainTabNavigator.Screen 
          name="Settings" 
          component={SettingsScreenWrapped}
          options={{
            tabBarLabel: 'Settings',
            tabBarIcon: ({ color }) => (
              <MaterialIcons name="settings" size={24} color={color} />
            ),
          }}
        />
      </MainTabNavigator.Navigator>
    </View>
  );
});
MainTabs.displayName = 'MainTabs';

export default function App() {
  const [deferredPrompt, setDeferredPrompt] = useState(null);
  const [showInstallBanner, setShowInstallBanner] = useState(false);

  // Load Roboto fonts for Material Design
  let [fontsLoaded] = useFonts({
    'Roboto-Light': Roboto_300Light,
    'Roboto-Regular': Roboto_400Regular,
    'Roboto-Medium': Roboto_500Medium,
    'Roboto-Bold': Roboto_700Bold,
  });

  // Memoize navigation config to prevent re-initialization on hot reload
  const navigationConfig = React.useMemo(() => ({ 
    enabled: false 
  }), []);

  useEffect(() => {
    // PWA Setup for web only
    if (Platform.OS === 'web') {
      // FIX 1: Global CSS override for scroll issues
      // React Native Web generates atomic CSS classes like 'r-overflow-1udh08x' (overflow:hidden)
      // React Navigation's scene containers use overflow:hidden which blocks scrolling
      // This CSS override ensures scrollable content works properly
      const styleEl = document.createElement('style');
      styleEl.id = 'rn-web-scroll-fix';
      styleEl.textContent = `
        /* Fix React Navigation scene container scroll blocking */
        [class*="r-overflow-"] {
          overflow: auto !important;
        }
        /* Ensure flex containers can grow properly - critical for scroll height calculation */
        [class*="r-flex-13awgt0"] {
          min-height: 0;
        }
        /* Fix webkit scroll behavior */
        [class*="r-WebkitOverflowScrolling"] {
          -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
          overflow-y: auto !important;
        }
        /* Ensure body and html allow scrolling */
        html, body, #root {
          height: 100%;
          overflow: auto;
        }
        /* Fix pointer events for scrollable containers - ensure clicks pass through */
        [class*="r-pointerEvents-12vffkv"] {
          pointer-events: auto !important;
        }
        /* Ensure inactive screens don't collapse to 0 height when visible */
        [class*="r-display-"][class*="r-flex-"] {
          display: flex !important;
        }
      `;
      if (!document.getElementById('rn-web-scroll-fix')) {
        document.head.appendChild(styleEl);
      }

      // FIX 2: aria-hidden focus conflict
      // React Navigation's react-native-screens sets aria-hidden="true" on inactive screens
      // This causes "Blocked aria-hidden on an element because its descendant retained focus"
      // Solution: Remove aria-hidden from ancestors when an element receives focus
      const handleFocusIn = (event) => {
        let el = event.target?.parentElement;
        while (el) {
          if (el.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'true') {
            // Remove aria-hidden to allow focus to work properly
            el.removeAttribute('aria-hidden');
            // Optionally, add inert attribute for proper behavior (supported in modern browsers)
            // el.setAttribute('inert', ''); // Uncomment if you want to use inert instead
          }
          el = el.parentElement;
        }
      };
      
      document.addEventListener('focusin', handleFocusIn);
      
      // Also fix any existing aria-hidden issues on load
      const fixAriaHidden = () => {
        const ariaHiddenElements = document.querySelectorAll('[aria-hidden="true"]');
        ariaHiddenElements.forEach(el => {
          const hasFocusableDescendant = el.querySelector(
            'button:not([disabled]), input:not([disabled]), a[href], [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])'
          );
          if (hasFocusableDescendant) {
            el.removeAttribute('aria-hidden');
          }
        });
      };
      
      // Run fix after React Navigation renders
      const timeoutId = setTimeout(fixAriaHidden, 1000);
      
      // Also run on route changes (using MutationObserver)
      const observer = new MutationObserver((mutations) => {
        mutations.forEach((mutation) => {
          if (mutation.type === 'attributes' && mutation.attributeName === 'aria-hidden') {
            fixAriaHidden();
          }
        });
      });
      
      observer.observe(document.body, {
        attributes: true,
        subtree: true,
        attributeFilter: ['aria-hidden']
      });
      
      // Cleanup
      const cleanup = () => {
        document.removeEventListener('focusin', handleFocusIn);
        clearTimeout(timeoutId);
        observer.disconnect();
        const styleEl = document.getElementById('rn-web-scroll-fix');
        if (styleEl) styleEl.remove();
      };
      
      // Store cleanup for useEffect return
      window.__ariaHiddenCleanup = cleanup;
      // Add comprehensive meta tags for Lighthouse compliance
      const metaTags = [
        { name: 'description', content: 'AI-powered estate inventory appraisal system with real-time eBay market valuations. Snap photos and get instant pricing powered by GPT-4.' },
        { name: 'keywords', content: 'estate appraisal, eBay pricing, AI valuation, item appraisal, market research' },
        { name: 'author', content: 'ValueSnap' },
        { name: 'viewport', content: 'width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=5.0, user-scalable=yes' },
        { name: 'theme-color', content: '#6750A4' },
        { name: 'mobile-web-app-capable', content: 'yes' },
        { name: 'apple-mobile-web-app-capable', content: 'yes' },
        { name: 'apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style', content: 'default' },
        { name: 'apple-mobile-web-app-title', content: 'ValueSnap' },
        { property: 'og:title', content: 'ValueSnap - AI Estate Appraisals' },
        { property: 'og:description', content: 'AI-powered estate inventory appraisal system with real-time eBay market valuations.' },
        { property: 'og:type', content: 'website' },
      ];

      metaTags.forEach(({ name, property, content }) => {
        const existing = document.querySelector(
          name ? `meta[name="${name}"]` : `meta[property="${property}"]`
        );
        if (!existing) {
          const meta = document.createElement('meta');
          if (name) meta.setAttribute('name', name);
          if (property) meta.setAttribute('property', property);
          meta.setAttribute('content', content);
          document.head.appendChild(meta);
        }
      });

      // Add manifest link
      const manifestLink = document.createElement('link');
      manifestLink.rel = 'manifest';
      manifestLink.href = '/manifest.json';
      document.head.appendChild(manifestLink);

      // Service worker registration with better error handling
      if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) {
        window.addEventListener('load', () => {
          navigator.serviceWorker.register('/service-worker.js')
            .then(reg => {
              console.log('✅ Service Worker registered:', reg);
              // Check for updates
              reg.addEventListener('updatefound', () => {
                const newWorker = reg.installing;
                newWorker.addEventListener('statechange', () => {
                  if (newWorker.state === 'installed' && navigator.serviceWorker.controller) {
                    console.log('🔄 New version available, reload to update');
                  }
                });
              });
            })
            .catch(err => console.error('❌ Service Worker registration failed:', err));
        });
      }

      // Listen for install prompt
      window.addEventListener('beforeinstallprompt', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        setDeferredPrompt(e);
        setShowInstallBanner(true);
      });

      // Track installation
      window.addEventListener('appinstalled', () => {
        console.log('✅ PWA installed successfully');
        setShowInstallBanner(false);
      });

      // Check if already installed
      if (window.matchMedia('(display-mode: standalone)').matches) {
        console.log('✅ App is running in standalone mode');
      }
      
      // Return cleanup function
      return () => {
        if (window.__ariaHiddenCleanup) {
          window.__ariaHiddenCleanup();
          delete window.__ariaHiddenCleanup;
        }
      };
    }
  }, []);

  const handleInstallClick = async () => {
    if (!deferredPrompt) return;

    deferredPrompt.prompt();
    const { outcome } = await deferredPrompt.userChoice;
    
    if (outcome === 'accepted') {
      console.log('User accepted install');
    }
    
    setDeferredPrompt(null);
    setShowInstallBanner(false);
  };

  // Show loading screen while fonts load
  if (!fontsLoaded) {
    return (
      <View style={{ flex: 1, justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center', backgroundColor: '#FFFBFE' }}>
        <Text style={{ fontSize: 16, color: '#6750A4' }}>Loading ValueSnap...</Text>
      </View>
    );
  }

  return (
    <GestureHandlerRootView style={{ flex: 1 }}>
      <ErrorBoundary>
        <SafeAreaProvider>
          {/* documentTitle config memoized to prevent re-initialization during hot reload */}
          <NavigationContainer 
            documentTitle={navigationConfig}
            onReady={() => console.log('✅ Navigation ready')}
          >
            <StatusBar style="dark" />
          
          {/* PWA Install Banner (web only) */}
          {Platform.OS === 'web' && showInstallBanner && (
            <View style={styles.installBanner}>
              <Text style={styles.installText}>Install app for offline access</Text>
              <TouchableOpacity onPress={handleInstallClick} style={styles.installButton}>
                <Text style={styles.installButtonText}>Install</Text>
              </TouchableOpacity>
              <TouchableOpacity onPress={() => setShowInstallBanner(false)} style={styles.closeButton}>
                <Text style={styles.closeButtonText}>✕</Text>
              </TouchableOpacity>
            </View>
          )}

          <MainTabs />
          </NavigationContainer>
        </SafeAreaProvider>
      </ErrorBoundary>
    </GestureHandlerRootView>
  );
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  installBanner: {
    position: 'absolute',
    top: 0,
    left: 0,
    right: 0,
    backgroundColor: colors.primary.main,
    padding: spacing.md,
    flexDirection: 'row',
    alignItems: 'center',
    justifyContent: 'space-between',
    zIndex: 1000,
    ...elevation.level8,
  },
  installText: {
    color: colors.primary.onPrimary,
    flex: 1,
    ...typography.body2,
  },
  installButton: {
    backgroundColor: colors.secondary.main,
    paddingHorizontal: spacing.md,
    paddingVertical: spacing.sm,
    borderRadius: 20,
    marginRight: spacing.sm,
    ...elevation.level2,
  },
  installButtonText: {
    color: colors.secondary.onSecondary,
    ...typography.button,
  },
  closeButton: {
    padding: 4,
  },
  closeButtonText: {
    color: 'white',
    fontSize: 18,
    fontWeight: 'bold',
  },
});

module.exports = function (api) {
  api.cache(true);
  return {
    presets: [
      ['babel-preset-expo', {
        // CRITICAL: Disable Expo Router (file-based routing)
        // We're using traditional React Navigation with App.js as the entry point
        // Setting this to false prevents the bundler from treating 'app/' as routes
        lazyImports: true,
      }],
    ],
    plugins: [
      // Required for React Navigation to work properly
      'react-native-reanimated/plugin',
    ],
  };
};

#!/bin/bash
# Clear all caches for Expo/Metro to resolve asset and navigation issues

echo "🧹 Clearing Metro bundler cache..."
rm -rf node_modules/.cache

echo "🧹 Clearing Expo cache..."
rm -rf .expo

echo "🧹 Clearing Metro cache..."
npx expo start --clear

echo "✅ Cache cleared! Metro will restart with clean cache."

File: appraisal-mobile/Dockerfile

# Dockerfile for Frontend React Native/Expo App
FROM node:20-slim

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Install Expo CLI globally
RUN npm install -g expo-cli

# Copy package files
COPY package*.json ./

# Install dependencies
RUN npm install

# Copy application code
COPY . .

# Expose Expo development ports
EXPOSE 19000 19001 19002 19006

# Set environment variable for backend URL (will be overridden by docker-compose)
ENV REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=http://backend:5000

# Start Expo development server
CMD ["npx", "expo", "start", "--web"]

File: appraisal-mobile/index.js
================
// CRITICAL: Import gesture-handler FIRST before anything else
// This is required for React Navigation to work properly
import 'react-native-gesture-handler';

import { registerRootComponent } from 'expo';
import { LogBox } from 'react-native';

// Enable screens for React Navigation (critical for proper navigator registration)
import { enableScreens } from 'react-native-screens';
enableScreens();

import App from './App';

// Performance monitoring for Lighthouse
if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
  // Add global error handler for debugging (production-safe)
  window.onerror = function(message, source, lineno, colno, error) {
    console.error('🔴 Global Error:', {
      message,
      source,
      lineno,
      colno,
      error: error?.stack
    });
    // Only alert in development
    if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development') {
      alert(`Error: ${message}\nAt: ${source}:${lineno}:${colno}\n\nCheck console for details`);
    }
    return false;
  };
  
  window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection', function(event) {
    console.error('🔴 Unhandled Promise Rejection:', event.reason);
    if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development') {
      alert(`Promise Rejection: ${event.reason}\n\nCheck console for details`);
    }
  });

  // Performance monitoring
  if ('performance' in window && 'PerformanceObserver' in window) {
    try {
      // Monitor First Contentful Paint
      const perfObserver = new PerformanceObserver((list) => {
        for (const entry of list.getEntries()) {
          console.log(`⚡ ${entry.name}: ${entry.startTime.toFixed(2)}ms`);
        }
      });
      perfObserver.observe({ entryTypes: ['paint', 'largest-contentful-paint'] });
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('Performance monitoring not available');
    }
  }
  
  console.log('✅ Performance monitoring and error handlers installed');
}

// Suppress specific warnings for production (these are from internal RN/Expo components)
LogBox.ignoreLogs([
  'Running "main" with appParams',
  '"shadow*" style props are deprecated',  // Web shadow deprecation
  'props.pointerEvents is deprecated',     // Internal RN component warning
  'Props.pointerEvents is deprecated',     // Alternate casing
]);

// registerRootComponent calls AppRegistry.registerComponent('main', () => App);
// It also ensures that whether you load the app in Expo Go or in a native build,
// the environment is set up appropriately
registerRootComponent(App);

================
File: appraisal-mobile/metro.config.js
================
// Learn more https://docs.expo.io/guides/customizing-metro
const { getDefaultConfig } = require('expo/metro-config');
const path = require('path');

/** @type {import('expo/metro-config').MetroConfig} */
const config = getDefaultConfig(__dirname);

// CRITICAL FIX: Ensure single copies of React Navigation packages
// The "Couldn't register the navigator" error often occurs when
// multiple copies of @react-navigation packages are bundled
const reactNavigationPackages = [
  '@react-navigation/native',
  '@react-navigation/core',
  '@react-navigation/elements',
  '@react-navigation/bottom-tabs',
  '@react-navigation/stack',
  'react-native-screens',
  'react-native-safe-area-context',
];

// Create extraNodeModules to resolve from project root
const extraNodeModules = {};
reactNavigationPackages.forEach((pkg) => {
  try {
    extraNodeModules[pkg] = path.resolve(__dirname, 'node_modules', pkg);
  } catch (e) {
    // Package not installed, skip
  }
});

config.resolver = {
  ...config.resolver,
  extraNodeModules,
  unstable_enablePackageExports: true,
};

config.transformer = {
  ...config.transformer,
  unstable_allowRequireContext: false,
};

module.exports = config;

File: appraisal-mobile/nginx.conf

# ValueSnap - Nginx Configuration for Production
# Lighthouse-optimized for performance, PWA, and SEO

server {
    listen 80;
    listen [::]:80;
    server_name valuesnap.app www.valuesnap.app;
    
    # Redirect HTTP to HTTPS
    return 301 https://$server_name$request_uri;
}

server {
    listen 443 ssl http2;
    listen [::]:443 ssl http2;
    server_name valuesnap.app www.valuesnap.app;
    
    # SSL Configuration (use certbot/Let's Encrypt)
    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/valuesnap.app/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/valuesnap.app/privkey.pem;
    ssl_protocols TLSv1.2 TLSv1.3;
    ssl_ciphers HIGH:!aNULL:!MD5;
    ssl_prefer_server_ciphers on;
    
    # Root directory
    root /var/www/valuesnap/web-build;
    index index.html;
    
    # Gzip compression for better performance
    gzip on;
    gzip_vary on;
    gzip_min_length 1024;
    gzip_types
        text/plain
        text/css
        text/xml
        text/javascript
        application/json
        application/javascript
        application/xml+rss
        application/rss+xml
        application/atom+xml
        image/svg+xml
        font/woff
        font/woff2;
    
    # Brotli compression (if module available)
    brotli on;
    brotli_comp_level 6;
    brotli_types
        text/plain
        text/css
        text/xml
        text/javascript
        application/json
        application/javascript
        application/xml+rss
        font/woff
        font/woff2;
    
    # Security headers
    add_header X-Frame-Options "SAMEORIGIN" always;
    add_header X-Content-Type-Options "nosniff" always;
    add_header X-XSS-Protection "1; mode=block" always;
    add_header Referrer-Policy "strict-origin-when-cross-origin" always;
    add_header Permissions-Policy "geolocation=(), microphone=(), camera=(self)" always;
    
    # Content Security Policy
    add_header Content-Security-Policy "default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; connect-src 'self' https: wss:;" always;
    
    # Cache control for static assets
    location ~* \.(js|css|png|jpg|jpeg|gif|ico|svg|woff|woff2|ttf|eot)$ {
        expires 1y;
        add_header Cache-Control "public, immutable";
        access_log off;
    }
    
    # Service worker - no cache
    location = /service-worker.js {
        add_header Cache-Control "no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate";
        add_header Pragma "no-cache";
        expires 0;
    }
    
    # Manifest - short cache
    location = /manifest.json {
        add_header Cache-Control "public, max-age=3600";
        add_header Access-Control-Allow-Origin "*";
    }
    
    # API proxy (if needed)
    location /api/ {
        proxy_pass http://localhost:8080;
        proxy_http_version 1.1;
        proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header Connection 'upgrade';
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_cache_bypass $http_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
    
    # SPA routing - serve index.html for all routes
    location / {
        try_files $uri $uri/ /index.html;
        add_header Cache-Control "no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate";
    }
    
    # Deny access to hidden files
    location ~ /\. {
        deny all;
        access_log off;
        log_not_found off;
    }
}

================
File: appraisal-mobile/README.md
================
# ValueSnap - AI-Powered Item Appraisal

Professional React Native mobile application for instant item appraisal using AI and eBay marketplace data.

## ✨ Features

- 📷 **Camera Integration** - Snap photos or choose from gallery
- 🤖 **AI-Powered Analysis** - GPT-4 vision identifies items with detailed descriptions
- 💰 **Real-time Pricing** - Live eBay marketplace data for accurate valuations
- ⚡ **Quick Decisions** - Instant "Sell or Keep" decision interface
- 📱 **Cross-Platform** - Works on iOS, Android, and Web
- 🎨 **Professional UI** - Production-ready design system with consistent branding

## 🎨 Professional Design System

ValueSnap features a comprehensive design system built on industry best practices:

- **Design Tokens**: Consistent colors, typography, and spacing
- **Reusable Components**: Button, Card, InfoRow, LoadingIndicator
- **8-point Grid**: Visual harmony through systematic spacing
- **Semantic Colors**: Purpose-driven color palette
- **Professional Appearance**: Trustworthy, clear, and delightful UI

📚 **Documentation**:
- [Design System Guide](DESIGN_SYSTEM.md) - Complete design documentation
- [UI Quick Reference](UI_QUICK_REFERENCE.md) - Developer quick start
- [UI Transformation](UI_TRANSFORMATION.md) - Before/after analysis
- [Code Examples](CODE_TRANSFORMATION_EXAMPLES.md) - Implementation patterns

## Quick Start

### Prerequisites

- Node.js 20.x or higher
- Expo Go app on your phone (for testing on physical device)
- Backend server running (see main README)

### Installation

```bash
cd appraisal-mobile
npm install
```

### Running the App

#### On Web (Easiest for testing)
```bash
npm run web
```

#### On Physical Device via Expo Go

1. Install [Expo Go](https://expo.dev/client) on your phone
2. Start the development server:
   ```bash
   npm start
   ```
3. Scan the QR code with:
   - **iOS**: Camera app
   - **Android**: Expo Go app

4. **Important**: Update the backend URL in `src/services/api.js`:
   ```javascript
   const BACKEND_URL = 'http://YOUR_COMPUTER_IP:5000';
   ```
   Replace `YOUR_COMPUTER_IP` with your computer's local IP address (e.g., `192.168.1.100`)

#### On Android Emulator
```bash
npm run android
```

#### On iOS Simulator (macOS only)
```bash
npm run ios
```

## Project Structure

```
appraisal-mobile/
├── src/
│   ├── screens/
│   │   ├── CameraScreen.js    # Camera & image picker
│   │   └── ResultsScreen.js   # Analysis results & decision UI
│   ├── services/
│   │   └── api.js             # Backend API integration
│   └── components/            # Reusable components
├── App.js                     # Navigation setup
└── package.json
```

## How It Works

1. **Capture** - User takes photo or selects from gallery
2. **Upload** - Image sent to Flask backend as base64
3. **Analyze** - Backend uses OpenAI GPT-4 Vision + eBay API
4. **Display** - Results shown with pricing and item details
5. **Decide** - User chooses to sell or keep the item

## Configuration

### Backend URL

Edit `src/services/api.js` to point to your backend:

```javascript
const BACKEND_URL = __DEV__ 
  ? 'http://YOUR_IP:5000'              // Development
  : 'https://your-backend.com';         // Production
```

### Finding Your Local IP

**macOS/Linux:**
```bash
ifconfig | grep "inet " | grep -v 127.0.0.1
```

**Windows:**
```cmd
ipconfig
```

Look for "IPv4 Address" under your active network adapter.

## Troubleshooting

### "Network request failed"

- Ensure backend is running on port 5000
- Check that you're using the correct IP address
- Make sure your phone and computer are on the same WiFi network
- Try disabling firewall temporarily

### Camera permissions

The app will request camera and photo library permissions automatically. If denied:
- iOS: Settings → Privacy → Camera/Photos → Enable for Expo Go
- Android: Settings → Apps → Expo Go → Permissions

### Slow analysis

- Normal processing time is 10-20 seconds
- Requires active internet connection
- Backend calls OpenAI API (can be slow on first request)

## Development

### Install new dependencies
```bash
npm install <package-name>
```

### Clear cache
```bash
npx expo start --clear
```

### View logs
```bash
npx expo start --android --clear  # Android logs
npx expo start --ios --clear      # iOS logs
```

## Testing Workflow

1. Start backend: `cd .. && source venv/bin/activate && python backend/run_backend.py`
2. Start app: `npm start`
3. Scan QR code with Expo Go
4. Grant camera permissions
5. Take photo of an item
6. Wait for analysis (10-20 seconds)
7. View results and make decision

## Production Build

### Android APK
```bash
expo build:android
```

### iOS App
```bash
expo build:ios
```

## Tech Stack

- **React Native** - Mobile framework
- **Expo** - Development platform
- **React Navigation** - Screen routing
- **Expo Camera** - Camera functionality
- **Expo Image Picker** - Gallery access

## Backend Integration

This app connects to the Flask backend at `/process` endpoint:

**Request:**
```json
{
  "image_base64": "base64_encoded_image_data"
}
```

**Response:**
```json
{
  "description": "AI analysis of the item",
  "structured_data": {
    "item_type": "book",
    "brand": "unknown",
    "model": "A Memory of Light",
    "condition": "used"
  },
  "quicksell_price": 5.12,
  "patient_sell_price": 7.38,
  "listings_count": 49,
  "sell_time_estimate": "7-30 days"
}
```

MIT

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>ValueSnap Debug Test</title>
    <style>
        body { font-family: monospace; padding: 20px; background: #1e1e1e; color: #d4d4d4; }
        .log { margin: 5px 0; padding: 10px; background: #2d2d2d; border-radius: 4px; }
        .error { background: #5a1e1e; color: #f48771; }
        .success { background: #1e5a1e; color: #4ec9b0; }
        .info { background: #1e3a5a; color: #9cdcfe; }
        h1 { color: #4ec9b0; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <h1>🔍 ValueSnap Browser Debug Test</h1>
    <div id="logs"></div>
    
    <script>
        const logsDiv = document.getElementById('logs');
        
        function addLog(message, type = 'info') {
            const div = document.createElement('div');
            div.className = `log ${type}`;
            div.textContent = message;
            logsDiv.appendChild(div);
            console.log(message);
        }
        
        // Override console methods
        const originalLog = console.log;
        const originalError = console.error;
        const originalWarn = console.warn;
        
        console.log = function(...args) {
            addLog('ℹ️ ' + args.join(' '), 'info');
            originalLog.apply(console, args);
        };
        
        console.error = function(...args) {
            addLog('❌ ' + args.join(' '), 'error');
            originalError.apply(console, args);
        };
        
        console.warn = function(...args) {
            addLog('⚠️ ' + args.join(' '), 'info');
            originalWarn.apply(console, args);
        };
        
        // Catch global errors
        window.onerror = function(msg, url, line, col, error) {
            addLog(`💥 Error at ${url}:${line}:${col} - ${msg}`, 'error');
            if (error && error.stack) {
                addLog(`Stack: ${error.stack}`, 'error');
            }
            return false;
        };
        
        window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection', function(event) {
            addLog(`💥 Unhandled Promise Rejection: ${event.reason}`, 'error');
        });
        
        addLog('🚀 Starting to load app bundle...', 'info');
        
        // Load the bundle
        const script = document.createElement('script');
        script.src = 'http://localhost:8081/index.bundle?platform=web&dev=true&hot=false';
        script.onload = function() {
            addLog('✅ Bundle loaded successfully!', 'success');
        };
        script.onerror = function() {
            addLog('❌ Failed to load bundle from server', 'error');
        };
        
        document.body.appendChild(script);
        
        // Also create the root div
        const root = document.createElement('div');
        root.id = 'root';
        root.style.cssText = 'position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; display: flex; flex: 1;';
        document.body.appendChild(root);
    </script>
</body>
</html>

# 🚀 Testing & Deployment Guide

## Testing the New UI

### 1. Quick Visual Test

The easiest way to see the new professional UI is to run the app:

```bash
cd appraisal-mobile
npm install  # If you haven't already
npm run web  # Opens in browser
```

### 2. Testing on Physical Device

For the best experience, test on a real device:

```bash
npm start
```

Then scan the QR code with:
- **iOS**: Camera app → Opens in Expo Go
- **Android**: Expo Go app → Scan QR

### 3. What to Look For

#### CameraScreen
- ✅ Clean white header with "ValueSnap" branding
- ✅ Clear subtitle: "AI-Powered Item Appraisal"
- ✅ Professional blue primary button
- ✅ Outlined secondary button
- ✅ Consistent spacing (8-point grid)
- ✅ Trust-building footer with security message

#### ResultsScreen
- ✅ Professional header with back button
- ✅ Card-based layout with subtle shadows
- ✅ Enhanced pricing display with clear hierarchy
- ✅ Well-organized item details
- ✅ Professional decision buttons
- ✅ Fixed action bar at bottom

#### Overall
- ✅ Consistent colors throughout
- ✅ Professional typography
- ✅ Smooth transitions
- ✅ Clear visual hierarchy

## Testing Checklist

### Functional Testing
- [ ] Camera permission request works
- [ ] Take photo functionality works
- [ ] Choose from gallery works
- [ ] Loading indicator shows during analysis
- [ ] Progress messages update in real-time
- [ ] Results display correctly
- [ ] Back navigation works
- [ ] Decision buttons (Sell/Keep) work
- [ ] "Appraise Another Item" button works

### Visual Testing
- [ ] Header looks professional
- [ ] Buttons have consistent styling
- [ ] Cards have proper spacing and shadows
- [ ] Typography is clear and readable
- [ ] Colors match design system
- [ ] Spacing follows 8-point grid
- [ ] Images display correctly
- [ ] Footer text is subtle but readable

### Responsive Testing
- [ ] Works on small phones (iPhone SE)
- [ ] Works on large phones (iPhone Pro Max)
- [ ] Works on Android devices
- [ ] Works in web browser
- [ ] Scrolling is smooth
- [ ] Action bar stays fixed at bottom

### Edge Cases
- [ ] Long item names don't break layout
- [ ] Missing data (N/A) displays correctly
- [ ] Very long AI descriptions scroll properly
- [ ] Loading states handle slow connections
- [ ] Error states display properly

## Performance Testing

### Load Times
```bash
# Monitor performance
npm start -- --clear
```

Expected times:
- Initial app load: < 3 seconds
- Screen transitions: < 300ms
- Image processing start: < 500ms

### Memory Usage
- No memory leaks on navigation
- Images properly cleanup
- Components unmount cleanly

## Debugging Common Issues

### Issue: Components not found
**Solution**: Ensure imports are correct
```javascript
import { Button, Card } from '../components';
import { colors, spacing } from '../constants/theme';
```

### Issue: Styles not applying
**Solution**: Check theme import path
```javascript
// Correct
import { colors } from '../constants/theme';

// If in different directory, adjust:
import { colors } from '../../constants/theme';
```

### Issue: Backend connection fails
**Solution**: Update API URL in `src/services/apiV1.js`
```javascript
const BACKEND_URL = 'http://YOUR_LOCAL_IP:5000';
```

## Deployment Steps

### 1. Prepare for Production

```bash
# Install dependencies
npm install

# Run tests (if you have them)
npm test

# Build for production
npm run build  # For web
```

### 2. Expo Build (Mobile)

```bash
# Login to Expo
expo login

# Build for iOS
expo build:ios

# Build for Android
expo build:android
```

### 3. Update Configuration

Update `app.json`:
```json
{
  "expo": {
    "name": "ValueSnap",
    "slug": "valuesnap",
    "version": "1.0.0",
    "icon": "./assets/icon.png",
    "splash": {
      "image": "./assets/splash.png",
      "backgroundColor": "#4299E1"
    }
  }
}
```

### 4. Environment Variables

Create `.env`:
```
BACKEND_URL=https://your-production-backend.com
API_TIMEOUT=30000
```

Update code to use environment variables:
```javascript
const BACKEND_URL = process.env.BACKEND_URL || 'http://localhost:5000';
```

# Troubleshooting Guide

## Current Fixes Applied

### Issue 1: "Couldn't register the navigator"
**Root Causes:**
1. Missing `react-native-gesture-handler` import at the top
2. Navigator instances being recreated on hot reload
3. Missing `enableScreens()` call

**Fixes Applied:**
- ✅ Added `import 'react-native-gesture-handler'` at the top of both `index.js` and `App.js`
- ✅ Added `enableScreens()` call in `index.js`
- ✅ Used `React.memo` on all navigator components
- ✅ Created navigator instances ONCE at module level (not inside components)
- ✅ Added `displayName` to all memoized components for better debugging

### Issue 2: "Asset not found: icon.png"
**Root Cause:**
- Metro bundler cache corruption
- Asset bundle patterns not catching all files

**Fixes Applied:**
- ✅ Changed `assetBundlePatterns` from `["assets/**"]` to `["**/*"]` in `app.json`
- ✅ Created `clear-cache.sh` script to clear Metro cache

## How to Test

### Clean Start (Recommended after fixes)
```bash
# Clear all caches
cd /home/elawa/projects/ebay-extract/appraisal-mobile
./clear-cache.sh

# Or manually:
rm -rf node_modules/.cache .expo
npx expo start --clear --web
```

### Normal Start
```bash
cd /home/elawa/projects/ebay-extract
./start-dev.sh
```

Then open: http://localhost:19006

## Expected Behavior After Fixes

✅ **No "Couldn't register navigator" error**
✅ **All assets load correctly**
✅ **Navigation works smoothly between tabs**
✅ **Desktop layout shows eBay-style header/footer (>1024px width)**
✅ **Mobile layout shows bottom tab bar (<1024px width)**
✅ **Hot reload works without crashes**

## If Issues Persist

1. **Check for duplicate packages:**
   ```bash
   npm ls @react-navigation/native @react-navigation/stack
   ```
   If you see duplicates, run:
   ```bash
   rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json
   npm install
   ```

2. **Verify gesture-handler is installed:**
   ```bash
   npm ls react-native-gesture-handler
   ```

3. **Check console for specific errors:**
   - Open browser DevTools (F12)
   - Look for red errors in Console tab
   - Check Network tab for failed asset requests

4. **Nuclear option (if all else fails):**
   ```bash
   rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json .expo
   npm install
   npx expo start --clear --web
   ```

## Architecture Notes

### Navigator Setup (Critical!)
```javascript
// ✅ CORRECT: Create navigators at module level
const AppraiseStackNavigator = createStackNavigator();
const MainTabNavigator = createBottomTabNavigator();

// ✅ CORRECT: Memoized component
const AppraiseStack = React.memo(() => (
  <AppraiseStackNavigator.Navigator>
    {/* screens */}
  </AppraiseStackNavigator.Navigator>
));

// ❌ WRONG: Creating inside component
function AppraiseStack() {
  const Stack = createStackNavigator(); // DON'T DO THIS!
  return <Stack.Navigator>...</Stack.Navigator>;
}
```

### Import Order (Critical!)
```javascript
// ✅ CORRECT ORDER:
import 'react-native-gesture-handler'; // MUST BE FIRST!
import { enableScreens } from 'react-native-screens';
enableScreens(); // MUST BE BEFORE App import
import App from './App';
```

File: backend/auth.py
================
"""
eBay OAuth Authentication Module

This module handles OAuth token generation for eBay API access.
Supports both sandbox and production environments with token caching.
"""

import requests
import os
import time
import logging
from base64 import b64encode
from typing import Optional, Dict, Any
from dotenv import load_dotenv

# Load environment variables
load_dotenv()

# Configure logging
logging.basicConfig(level=os.getenv("LOG_LEVEL", "INFO"))
logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

class EbayAuth:
    """Handles eBay OAuth authentication with token caching."""
    
    def __init__(self, use_sandbox: bool = True):
        """
        Initialize eBay authentication.
        
        Args:
            use_sandbox: If True, use sandbox credentials; if False, use production
        """
        self.use_sandbox = use_sandbox
        self.token_cache: Dict[str, Any] = {}
        self.cache_duration = int(os.getenv("EBAY_TOKEN_CACHE_DURATION", "7200"))  # 2 hours default
        
        if use_sandbox:
            self.app_id = os.getenv("EBAY_SANDBOX_APP_ID")
            self.cert_id = os.getenv("EBAY_SANDBOX_CERT_ID")
            self.token_url = "https://api.sandbox.ebay.com/identity/v1/oauth2/token"
        else:
            self.app_id = os.getenv("EBAY_PROD_APP_ID")
            self.cert_id = os.getenv("EBAY_PROD_CERT_ID")
            self.token_url = "https://api.ebay.com/identity/v1/oauth2/token"
        
        if not self.app_id or not self.cert_id:
            env_type = "sandbox" if use_sandbox else "production"
            raise ValueError(f"eBay {env_type} credentials not found. Please set EBAY_{env_type.upper()}_APP_ID and EBAY_{env_type.upper()}_CERT_ID in your .env file.")
    
    def _is_token_valid(self) -> bool:
        """Check if cached token is still valid."""
        if not self.token_cache:
            return False
        
        current_time = time.time()
        token_time = self.token_cache.get('timestamp', 0)
        return (current_time - token_time) < self.cache_duration
    
    def _generate_credentials(self) -> str:
        """Generate base64 encoded credentials for OAuth."""
        credentials = f"{self.app_id}:{self.cert_id}"
        return b64encode(credentials.encode()).decode()
    
    def get_token(self) -> str:
        """
        Get a valid OAuth token, using cache if available.
        
        Returns:
            str: OAuth access token
            
        Raises:
            Exception: If token generation fails
        """
        # Check if we have a valid cached token
        if self._is_token_valid():
            logger.debug("Using cached eBay OAuth token")
            return self.token_cache['access_token']
        
        logger.info("Generating new eBay OAuth token")
        
        # Prepare OAuth request
        credentials = self._generate_credentials()
        headers = {
            "Content-Type": "application/x-www-form-urlencoded",
            "Authorization": f"Basic {credentials}"
        }
        data = {
            "grant_type": "client_credentials",
            "scope": "https://api.ebay.com/oauth/api_scope"
        }
        
        try:
            response = requests.post(self.token_url, headers=headers, data=data, timeout=30)
            
            if response.status_code == 200:
                token_data = response.json()
                access_token = token_data.get("access_token")
                
                if not access_token:
                    raise Exception("No access token in response")
                
                # Cache the token
                self.token_cache = {
                    'access_token': access_token,
                    'timestamp': time.time(),
                    'expires_in': token_data.get('expires_in', self.cache_duration)
                }
                
                logger.info("Successfully generated eBay OAuth token")
                return access_token
            else:
                error_msg = f"Token generation failed with status {response.status_code}: {response.text}"
                logger.error(error_msg)
                raise Exception(error_msg)
                
        except requests.exceptions.RequestException as e:
            error_msg = f"Network error during token generation: {str(e)}"
            logger.error(error_msg)
            raise Exception(error_msg)
    
    def clear_cache(self):
        """Clear the token cache to force a new token generation."""
        self.token_cache = {}
        logger.info("eBay OAuth token cache cleared")

# Global auth instance for easy access
_ebay_auth_instance: Optional[EbayAuth] = None

def get_ebay_auth(use_sandbox: bool = True) -> EbayAuth:
    """
    Get the global eBay auth instance.
    
    Args:
        use_sandbox: If True, use sandbox credentials; if False, use production
        
    Returns:
        EbayAuth: Configured authentication instance
    """
    global _ebay_auth_instance
    
    if _ebay_auth_instance is None or _ebay_auth_instance.use_sandbox != use_sandbox:
        _ebay_auth_instance = EbayAuth(use_sandbox=use_sandbox)
    
    return _ebay_auth_instance

def get_ebay_token(use_sandbox: bool = True) -> str:
    """
    Convenience function to get an eBay OAuth token.
    
    Args:
        use_sandbox: If True, use sandbox credentials; if False, use production
        
    Returns:
        str: OAuth access token
    """
    auth = get_ebay_auth(use_sandbox=use_sandbox)
    return auth.get_token()

# For backward compatibility
def get_ebay_token_legacy() -> str:
    """
    Legacy function for backward compatibility.
    Uses sandbox by default.
    """
    return get_ebay_token(use_sandbox=True)

File: backend/database.py
