/**
 * Playwright Test - History Screen Scroll & Interaction Analysis
 */

const { chromium } = require('playwright');

async function analyzeHistoryScreen() {
  console.log('🚀 Starting History Screen Analysis...\n');
  
  const browser = await chromium.launch({ 
    headless: true,
    args: ['--no-sandbox', '--disable-setuid-sandbox']
  });
  const context = await browser.newContext({
    viewport: { width: 1280, height: 720 }
  });
  const page = await context.newPage();

  try {
    console.log('📱 Loading app...\n');
    await page.goto('http://localhost:8081', { 
      waitUntil: 'networkidle',
      timeout: 30000 
    });
    await page.waitForTimeout(2000);
    
    // Take initial screenshot
    await page.screenshot({ path: '/home/elawa/projects/ebay-extract/history-1-initial.png', fullPage: true });
    console.log('📸 Screenshot 1: Initial state saved\n');

    // Try to find and click History tab
    console.log('🔍 Looking for History navigation...');
    
    // Check for History link/button in various forms
    const historySelectors = [
      'text=History',
      '[aria-label*="History"]',
      'button:has-text("History")',
      'a:has-text("History")',
      '[role="tab"]:has-text("History")',
    ];
    
    let historyClicked = false;
    for (const selector of historySelectors) {
      try {
        const element = await page.$(selector);
        if (element) {
          const isVisible = await element.isVisible();
          console.log(`  Found ${selector}: visible=${isVisible}`);
          if (isVisible) {
            await element.click();
            historyClicked = true;
            console.log(`  ✅ Clicked History via: ${selector}`);
            break;
          }
        }
      } catch (e) {
        // Continue to next selector
      }
    }
    
    if (!historyClicked) {
      console.log('  ⚠️ Could not find History navigation element');
    }
    
    await page.waitForTimeout(1500);
    await page.screenshot({ path: '/home/elawa/projects/ebay-extract/history-2-after-nav.png', fullPage: true });
    console.log('📸 Screenshot 2: After navigation saved\n');

    // Analyze the DOM hierarchy
    console.log('='.repeat(60));
    console.log('📊 DOM HIERARCHY ANALYSIS');
    console.log('='.repeat(60));
    
    const hierarchy = await page.evaluate(() => {
      const analyzeElement = (el, depth = 0) => {
        if (depth > 15) return null;
        
        const style = window.getComputedStyle(el);
        const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
        
        return {
          tag: el.tagName.toLowerCase(),
          className: el.className?.toString()?.substring(0, 50) || '',
          display: style.display,
          overflow: style.overflow,
          overflowY: style.overflowY,
          position: style.position,
          height: style.height,
          maxHeight: style.maxHeight,
          flex: style.flex,
          width: Math.round(rect.width),
          heightPx: Math.round(rect.height),
          scrollHeight: el.scrollHeight,
          clientHeight: el.clientHeight,
          canScroll: el.scrollHeight > el.clientHeight,
          hasOverflowScroll: style.overflowY === 'scroll' || style.overflowY === 'auto',
        };
      };
      
      // Walk down from body through the main content
      const results = [];
      let current = document.body;
      let depth = 0;
      
      while (current && depth < 20) {
        results.push({ depth, ...analyzeElement(current) });
        
        // Find the main child (usually the largest or the flex child)
        const children = Array.from(current.children).filter(c => 
          c.tagName !== 'SCRIPT' && c.tagName !== 'STYLE' && c.tagName !== 'NOSCRIPT'
        );
        
        if (children.length === 0) break;
        
        // Pick the largest child or the one with flex:1
        let nextChild = children[0];
        for (const child of children) {
          const style = window.getComputedStyle(child);
          const rect = child.getBoundingClientRect();
          if (rect.height > 100 || style.flex.includes('1')) {
            nextChild = child;
            break;
          }
        }
        
        current = nextChild;
        depth++;
      }
      
      return results;
    });
    
    console.log('\n📋 Container Chain (body → content):');
    hierarchy.forEach(h => {
      const indent = '  '.repeat(h.depth);
      const scrollIndicator = h.canScroll ? '📜' : '';
      const overflowIndicator = h.hasOverflowScroll ? '🔄' : '';
      console.log(`${indent}<${h.tag}> ${scrollIndicator}${overflowIndicator}`);
      console.log(`${indent}  class: ${h.className}...`);
      console.log(`${indent}  size: ${h.width}x${h.heightPx}px`);
      console.log(`${indent}  scroll: ${h.scrollHeight}/${h.clientHeight} (can scroll: ${h.canScroll})`);
      console.log(`${indent}  overflow-y: ${h.overflowY}, height: ${h.height}`);
    });

    // Find ALL scrollable containers
    console.log('\n\n🔄 ALL SCROLLABLE CONTAINERS:');
    console.log('-'.repeat(40));
    
    const scrollables = await page.evaluate(() => {
      return Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('*'))
        .filter(el => {
          const style = window.getComputedStyle(el);
          return (style.overflowY === 'scroll' || style.overflowY === 'auto') ||
                 el.scrollHeight > el.clientHeight;
        })
        .map(el => {
          const style = window.getComputedStyle(el);
          const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
          return {
            tag: el.tagName.toLowerCase(),
            className: el.className?.toString()?.substring(0, 60) || '',
            overflowY: style.overflowY,
            height: style.height,
            heightPx: Math.round(rect.height),
            scrollHeight: el.scrollHeight,
            clientHeight: el.clientHeight,
            canScroll: el.scrollHeight > el.clientHeight,
            problem: el.clientHeight === 0 ? '⚠️ HEIGHT IS 0' : 
                     (style.height === '100%' && el.parentElement?.clientHeight === 0) ? '⚠️ PARENT HEIGHT 0' : ''
          };
        });
    });
    
    scrollables.forEach((s, i) => {
      console.log(`\n[${i + 1}] <${s.tag}> ${s.problem}`);
      console.log(`    class: ${s.className}...`);
      console.log(`    overflow-y: ${s.overflowY}`);
      console.log(`    height: ${s.height} (actual: ${s.heightPx}px)`);
      console.log(`    scroll: ${s.scrollHeight}/${s.clientHeight}`);
      console.log(`    CAN SCROLL: ${s.canScroll ? '✅ Yes' : '❌ No'}`);
    });

    // Check for height:0 problems
    console.log('\n\n⚠️  ELEMENTS WITH HEIGHT ISSUES:');
    console.log('-'.repeat(40));
    
    const heightIssues = await page.evaluate(() => {
      return Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('*'))
        .filter(el => {
          const style = window.getComputedStyle(el);
          const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
          // Elements that should have height but don't
          return (style.flex === '1' || style.flex.includes('1 1') || style.flexGrow === '1') &&
                 rect.height === 0;
        })
        .slice(0, 10)
        .map(el => ({
          tag: el.tagName.toLowerCase(),
          className: el.className?.toString()?.substring(0, 60) || '',
          flex: window.getComputedStyle(el).flex,
          height: window.getComputedStyle(el).height,
          parentHeight: el.parentElement?.getBoundingClientRect().height || 0
        }));
    });
    
    if (heightIssues.length === 0) {
      console.log('  ✅ No height issues found');
    } else {
      heightIssues.forEach((issue, i) => {
        console.log(`\n[${i + 1}] <${issue.tag}>`);
        console.log(`    class: ${issue.className}...`);
        console.log(`    flex: ${issue.flex}`);
        console.log(`    height: ${issue.height}`);
        console.log(`    parent height: ${issue.parentHeight}px`);
      });
    }

    // Test clicking on a history card
    console.log('\n\n🖱️  CARD INTERACTIVITY TEST:');
    console.log('-'.repeat(40));
    
    const cards = await page.$$('[role="button"], [data-testid*="card"], [class*="card"]');
    console.log(`  Found ${cards.length} potential card elements`);
    
    // Try to find cards with appraisal content
    const appraisalCards = await page.$$eval('*', elements => {
      return elements
        .filter(el => {
          const text = el.textContent || '';
          return text.includes('$') && el.querySelector('img');
        })
        .slice(0, 5)
        .map(el => ({
          tag: el.tagName.toLowerCase(),
          className: el.className?.substring(0, 40) || '',
          text: el.textContent?.substring(0, 50) || ''
        }));
    });
    
    console.log(`  Found ${appraisalCards.length} elements with price and image`);
    appraisalCards.forEach((card, i) => {
      console.log(`    [${i + 1}] <${card.tag}> "${card.text}..."`);
    });

    // Final screenshot
    await page.screenshot({ path: '/home/elawa/projects/ebay-extract/history-3-final.png', fullPage: true });
    console.log('\n📸 Screenshot 3: Final state saved');

    console.log('\n' + '='.repeat(60));
    console.log('✅ Analysis complete');
    console.log('='.repeat(60));

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('❌ Error:', error.message);
  } finally {
    await browser.close();
  }
}

analyzeHistoryScreen();

File: test-interactive.js

/**
 * Playwright Interactive Test - Navigation, Scroll, and Click Testing
 */

const { chromium } = require('playwright');

async function testInteractive() {
  console.log('🚀 Starting Interactive Test...\n');
  
  const browser = await chromium.launch({ 
    headless: true, // Use headless for WSL
    args: ['--no-sandbox', '--disable-setuid-sandbox'],
  });
  const context = await browser.newContext({
    viewport: { width: 1280, height: 720 }
  });
  const page = await context.newPage();

  try {
    console.log('📱 Loading app...');
    await page.goto('http://localhost:8081', { 
      waitUntil: 'networkidle',
      timeout: 30000 
    });
    await page.waitForTimeout(2000);
    
    // Screenshot 1: Initial
    await page.screenshot({ path: '/home/elawa/projects/ebay-extract/test-1-initial.png' });
    console.log('📸 Screenshot 1: Initial state\n');

    // Find all clickable "History" elements
    console.log('🔍 Finding all History navigation options...');
    const historyElements = await page.$$('text=History');
    console.log(`   Found ${historyElements.length} elements with "History" text`);
    
    for (let i = 0; i < historyElements.length; i++) {
      const el = historyElements[i];
      const box = await el.boundingBox();
      const isVisible = await el.isVisible();
      console.log(`   [${i + 1}] Visible: ${isVisible}, Box: ${box ? `${box.x},${box.y} ${box.width}x${box.height}` : 'null'}`);
    }

    // Click the first visible History element
    for (const el of historyElements) {
      if (await el.isVisible()) {
        console.log('\n🖱️  Clicking History...');
        await el.click({ force: true });
        await page.waitForTimeout(1000);
        break;
      }
    }

    // Screenshot 2: After History click
    await page.screenshot({ path: '/home/elawa/projects/ebay-extract/test-2-history.png' });
    console.log('📸 Screenshot 2: After History click\n');

    // Check if we're now on History screen
    const pageContent = await page.content();
    const isOnHistory = pageContent.includes('Your saved appraisals') || 
                        pageContent.includes('No Appraisals Yet');
    console.log(`   On History screen: ${isOnHistory ? '✅ Yes' : '❌ No'}\n`);

    // Test scroll functionality
    console.log('🔄 Testing scroll functionality...');
    
    // Find the main scrollable container
    const scrollContainer = await page.$('[class*="r-overflow-1udh08x"]');
    if (scrollContainer) {
      const box = await scrollContainer.boundingBox();
      console.log(`   Found scroll container: ${box?.width}x${box?.height}`);
      
      // Move mouse to center of container and scroll
      if (box) {
        await page.mouse.move(box.x + box.width / 2, box.y + box.height / 2);
        
        const scrollBefore = await scrollContainer.evaluate(el => el.scrollTop);
        console.log(`   Scroll position before: ${scrollBefore}px`);
        
        // Scroll down
        await page.mouse.wheel(0, 300);
        await page.waitForTimeout(500);
        
        const scrollAfter = await scrollContainer.evaluate(el => el.scrollTop);
        console.log(`   Scroll position after: ${scrollAfter}px`);
        console.log(`   Scroll worked: ${scrollAfter > scrollBefore ? '✅ Yes' : '❌ No'}`);
      }
    } else {
      console.log('   ⚠️ Could not find scroll container');
    }

    // Screenshot 3: After scroll
    await page.screenshot({ path: '/home/elawa/projects/ebay-extract/test-3-scroll.png' });
    console.log('📸 Screenshot 3: After scroll attempt\n');

    // Test card click
    console.log('🖱️  Testing card interaction...');
    const cards = await page.$$('[role="button"]');
    console.log(`   Found ${cards.length} buttons/cards`);
    
    if (cards.length > 0) {
      const firstCard = cards[0];
      const cardBox = await firstCard.boundingBox();
      console.log(`   First card at: ${cardBox?.x},${cardBox?.y}`);
      
      // Try clicking
      try {
        await firstCard.click({ timeout: 3000 });
        console.log('   ✅ Card click succeeded');
      } catch (e) {
        console.log(`   ❌ Card click failed: ${e.message}`);
      }
    }

    // Screenshot 4: Final
    await page.screenshot({ path: '/home/elawa/projects/ebay-extract/test-4-final.png' });
    console.log('📸 Screenshot 4: Final state\n');

    console.log('='.repeat(60));
    console.log('✅ Interactive test complete');
    console.log('='.repeat(60));


  } catch (error) {
    console.error('❌ Error:', error.message);
  } finally {
    await browser.close();
  }
}

testInteractive();
